use rediss:// for TLS):\n#   rediss://default:your-password@your-region.upstash.io:6379\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nREDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# FILE STORAGE (S3-Compatible: Backblaze B2, AWS S3, MinIO)\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# All environments use the same bucket, different prefix for isolation\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nS3_ENDPOINT=https://s3.us-west-000.backblazeb2.com\nS3_REGION=us-west-000\nS3_BUCKET=your-bucket-name\nS3_PREFIX=test/                         # test/ | staging/ | production/\nS3_ACCESS_KEY=your-access-key-id\nS3_SECRET_KEY=your-secret-access-key\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# AUTHENTICATION\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32\nJWT_SECRET=CHANGE_THIS_TO_A_RANDOM_SECRET_KEY_AT_LEAST_32_CHARS\nJWT_EXPIRES_IN=15m\nREFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN=7d\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# EMAIL (Optional - Resend, SendGrid, etc.)\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nRESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxxxxxxxxxxx\nEMAIL_FROM=noreply@yourcompany.com\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# URLS (Update per environment)\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Test (Local):\nAPI_URL=http://localhost:4000\nWEB_URL=http://localhost:3000\nWS_URL=ws://localhost:4000\n\n# Staging:\n# API_URL=https://api-staging.yourcompany.com\n# WEB_URL=https://staging.yourcompany.com\n# WS_URL=wss://api-staging.yourcompany.com\n\n# Production:\n# API_URL=https://api.yourcompany.com\n# WEB_URL=https://app.yourcompany.com\n# WS_URL=wss://api.yourcompany.com\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# CORS (Comma-separated allowed origins)\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nCORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:5173,tauri://localhost\n\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# DEPLOYMENT (For docker-compose.deploy.yml)\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nDOMAIN=localhost\nACME_EMAIL=admin@yourcompany.com\nREGISTRY=ghcr.io/yourcompany\nTAG=latest\n",

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/README.md)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/README.md)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# Nucleus Business Suite\n\nWeb-based ERP with multi-platform POS system built with NestJS, Next.js, and Tauri.\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Backend:** NestJS (TypeScript)\n- **Web Frontend:** Next.js 14 (React, TypeScript)\n- **Desktop/Mobile POS:** Tauri v2 (React + Rust)\n- **Database:** PostgreSQL (via Prisma)\n- **Cache:** Redis\n- **File Storage:** S3-compatible (Backblaze B2)\n- **Monorepo:** pnpm + Turborepo\n\n## Prerequisites\n\n- Node.js &gt;= 20.0.0\n- pnpm &gt;= 9.0.0\n- Docker &amp; Docker Compose\n- Rust (for Tauri development)\n\n## Quick Start\n\n### 1. Clone and Install\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngit clone https://github.com/yourcompany/nucleus-business-suite.git\ncd nucleus-business-suite\npnpm install\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Setup Environment\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ncp .env.example .env.test\n# Edit .env.test with your local settings\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. Start Local Services (PostgreSQL, Redis)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\npnpm docker:dev\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. Setup Database\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\npnpm db:generate  # Generate Prisma client\npnpm db:push      # Push schema to database\npnpm db:seed      # Seed initial data\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 5. Start Development\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\npnpm dev\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThis starts:\n- API: http://localhost:4000\n- Web: http://localhost:3000\n- API Docs: http://localhost:4000/docs\n\n## Project Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n├── apps/\n│   ├── api/          # NestJS backend\n│   ├── web/          # Next.js frontend (dashboard + eCommerce)\n│   └── pos/          # Tauri POS application\n├── packages/\n│   ├── shared/       # Shared types &amp; utilities\n│   └── ui/           # Shared UI components\n├── docker/           # Docker configurations\n└── scripts/          # Build &amp; deployment scripts\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Development Commands\n\n| Command | Description |\n|---------|-------------|\n| &#96;pnpm dev&#96; | Start all apps in development mode |\n| &#96;pnpm build&#96; | Build all apps |\n| &#96;pnpm test&#96; | Run tests |\n| &#96;pnpm lint&#96; | Lint all packages |\n| &#96;pnpm docker:dev&#96; | Start local PostgreSQL &amp; Redis |\n| &#96;pnpm docker:dev:down&#96; | Stop local services |\n| &#96;pnpm db:studio&#96; | Open Prisma Studio |\n\n## Environments\n\n| Environment | Branch | URL |\n|-------------|--------|-----|\n| Test | &#96;develop&#96; | &#96;localhost&#96; |\n| Staging | &#96;staging&#96; | &#96;staging.yourcompany.com&#96; |\n| Production | &#96;main&#96; | &#96;app.yourcompany.com&#96; |\n\n## License\n\nProprietary - All rights reserved\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="copilot_createFile">

<summary>Tool use: **copilot_createFile**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "file_path": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\.github\\copilot-instructions.md",
  "relativeWorkspacePath": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\.github\\copilot-instructions.md"
}
```

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/copilot-instructions.md)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/copilot-instructions.md)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# Nucleus Business Suite - AI Coding Guidelines\n\n## Project Overview\n\nThis is a web-based ERP with multi-platform POS system. The architecture follows a monorepo pattern with:\n- &#96;apps/api&#96; - NestJS backend (REST + WebSocket)\n- &#96;apps/web&#96; - Next.js frontend (dashboard + eCommerce storefront)\n- &#96;apps/pos&#96; - Tauri v2 desktop/mobile POS with hardware integration\n- &#96;packages/shared&#96; - Shared TypeScript types and utilities\n- &#96;packages/ui&#96; - Shared React components\n\n## Architecture Principles\n\n### Environment-Based Service Switching\n- **Test (local):** PostgreSQL and Redis run in Docker containers\n- **Staging/Production:** Connect to external services (Neon, Upstash, Backblaze B2)\n- All config via environment variables - NO code changes between environments\n- File storage always uses S3-compatible API with different prefixes per environment\n\n### Data Flow\n- API is stateless - all persistent data in PostgreSQL\n- Redis for caching, sessions, and real-time pub/sub via Socket.io\n- File uploads go directly to S3-compatible storage (Backblaze B2)\n- Tauri POS uses local SQLite for offline-first capability, syncs when online\n\n## Code Conventions\n\n### Backend (NestJS - &#96;apps/api&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Module structure - each feature in apps/api/src/modules/{feature}/\nfeature/\n├── feature.module.ts      // NestJS module\n├── feature.controller.ts  // HTTP endpoints\n├── feature.service.ts     // Business logic\n├── feature.gateway.ts     // WebSocket events (if needed)\n├── dto/                   // Request/Response DTOs with class-validator\n├── entities/              // Prisma model extensions\n└── feature.spec.ts        // Tests\n\n// DTO example with validation\nimport { IsString, IsNumber, IsOptional } from 'class-validator';\n\nexport class CreateProductDto {\n  @IsString()\n  name: string;\n\n  @IsNumber()\n  price: number;\n\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  description?: string;\n}\n\n// Service pattern - inject PrismaService\n@Injectable()\nexport class ProductsService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n  \n  async create(dto: CreateProductDto) {\n    return this.prisma.product.create({ data: dto });\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Frontend (Next.js - &#96;apps/web&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Use App Router (app/ directory)\n// Server Components by default, 'use client' only when needed\n\n// Data fetching with TanStack Query\nimport { useQuery, useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query';\n\nexport function useProducts() {\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: ['products'],\n    queryFn: () =&gt; api.get('/products'),\n  });\n}\n\n// State management with Zustand\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\n\ninterface CartStore {\n  items: CartItem[];\n  addItem: (item: CartItem) =&gt; void;\n}\n\nexport const useCartStore = create&lt;CartStore&gt;((set) =&gt; ({\n  items: [],\n  addItem: (item) =&gt; set((s) =&gt; ({ items: [...s.items, item] })),\n}));\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Tauri POS (&#96;apps/pos&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;rust\n// Hardware commands in src-tauri/src/commands/\n#[tauri::command]\nasync fn print_receipt(receipt: Receipt) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n    hardware::printer::print(&amp;receipt)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| e.to_string())\n}\n\n// Register in main.rs\nfn main() {\n    tauri::Builder::default()\n        .invoke_handler(tauri::generate_handler![print_receipt])\n        .run(tauri::generate_context!())\n        .expect(\"error running app\");\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Call from React frontend\nimport { invoke } from '@tauri-apps/api/core';\n\nawait invoke('print_receipt', { receipt: receiptData });\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Shared Types (&#96;packages/shared&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// All API types defined here and imported by both api and web\n// packages/shared/src/types/product.ts\nexport interface Product {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  price: number;\n  stock: number;\n  createdAt: Date;\n}\n\nexport type CreateProductInput = Omit&lt;Product, 'id' | 'createdAt'&gt;;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Database (Prisma)\n\n- Schema in &#96;apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma&#96;\n- Run &#96;pnpm db:generate&#96; after schema changes\n- Use &#96;pnpm db:push&#96; for development, &#96;pnpm db:migrate&#96; for production migrations\n- Name models in PascalCase, fields in camelCase\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;prisma\nmodel Product {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  price       Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  stock       Int      @default(0)\n  category    Category @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])\n  categoryId  String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## File Storage Pattern\n\nAlways use the storage service for file uploads - never store files locally:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// apps/api/src/modules/storage/storage.service.ts handles S3 operations\n// Files are stored as: {S3_PREFIX}/{entity}/{id}/{filename}\n// Example: production/products/abc123/image.jpg\n\nawait this.storageService.upload({\n  key: &#96;products/${productId}/${filename}&#96;,\n  body: buffer,\n  contentType: 'image/jpeg',\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Real-time Updates (WebSocket)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Gateway pattern for real-time features\n@WebSocketGateway({ cors: true })\nexport class SalesGateway {\n  @SubscribeMessage('sale:created')\n  handleSaleCreated(client: Socket, payload: Sale) {\n    // Broadcast to dashboard\n    this.server.emit('dashboard:sale', payload);\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Testing\n\n- Unit tests: &#96;*.spec.ts&#96; next to the file\n- E2E tests: &#96;apps/api/test/&#96;\n- Run with &#96;pnpm test&#96;\n\n## Common Tasks\n\n### Adding a New API Module\n\n1. Create folder &#96;apps/api/src/modules/{name}/&#96;\n2. Create module, controller, service, DTOs\n3. Add to &#96;apps/api/src/app.module.ts&#96; imports\n4. Add Prisma model if needed, run &#96;pnpm db:generate&#96;\n\n### Adding a New Web Page\n\n1. Create route in &#96;apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/{route}/page.tsx&#96;\n2. Use Server Components for data fetching\n3. Client Components for interactivity with 'use client'\n\n### Adding Hardware Support (Tauri)\n\n1. Add Rust implementation in &#96;apps/pos/src-tauri/src/hardware/&#96;\n2. Create Tauri command in &#96;apps/pos/src-tauri/src/commands/&#96;\n3. Register command in &#96;main.rs&#96;\n4. Call via &#96;invoke()&#96; from React\n\n## Don't Do\n\n- Don't store files on the server filesystem\n- Don't hardcode URLs - use environment variables\n- Don't bypass the storage service for file operations\n- Don't use &#96;any&#96; type in TypeScript - define proper types in &#96;packages/shared&#96;\n- Don't commit &#96;.env&#96; files - use &#96;.env.example&#96; as template\n- Don't run database migrations in test environment - use &#96;db:push&#96;\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/workflows/ci.yml)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/workflows/ci.yml)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "name: CI\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [develop, staging, main]\n  pull_request:\n    branches: [develop, staging, main]\n\nenv:\n  NODE_VERSION: '20'\n  PNPM_VERSION: '9'\n\njobs:\n  lint-and-test:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    \n    services:\n      postgres:\n        image: postgres:16-alpine\n        env:\n          POSTGRES_USER: postgres\n          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres\n          POSTGRES_DB: nucleus_test\n        ports:\n          - 5432:5432\n        options: &gt;-\n          --health-cmd pg_isready\n          --health-interval 10s\n          --health-timeout 5s\n          --health-retries 5\n      \n      redis:\n        image: redis:7-alpine\n        ports:\n          - 6379:6379\n        options: &gt;-\n          --health-cmd \"redis-cli ping\"\n          --health-interval 10s\n          --health-timeout 5s\n          --health-retries 5\n\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Setup pnpm\n        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3\n        with:\n          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}\n\n      - name: Setup Node.js\n        uses: actions/setup-node@v4\n        with:\n          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}\n          cache: 'pnpm'\n\n      - name: Install dependencies\n        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile\n\n      - name: Generate Prisma client\n        run: pnpm db:generate\n\n      - name: Lint\n        run: pnpm lint\n\n      - name: Type check\n        run: pnpm turbo typecheck\n\n      - name: Test\n        run: pnpm test\n        env:\n          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/nucleus_test\n          REDIS_URL: redis://localhost:6379\n          JWT_SECRET: test-secret-key-for-ci\n\n  build:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    needs: lint-and-test\n    \n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Setup pnpm\n        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3\n        with:\n          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}\n\n      - name: Setup Node.js\n        uses: actions/setup-node@v4\n        with:\n          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}\n          cache: 'pnpm'\n\n      - name: Install dependencies\n        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile\n\n      - name: Generate Prisma client\n        run: pnpm db:generate\n\n      - name: Build\n        run: pnpm build\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/.github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "name: Deploy to Staging\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [staging]\n\nenv:\n  REGISTRY: ghcr.io\n  IMAGE_PREFIX: ${{ github.repository }}\n\njobs:\n  build-and-push:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    permissions:\n      contents: read\n      packages: write\n\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Log in to Container Registry\n        uses: docker/login-action@v3\n        with:\n          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}\n          username: ${{ github.actor }}\n          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Set up Docker Buildx\n        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3\n\n      - name: Build and push API\n        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5\n        with:\n          context: .\n          file: ./apps/api/Dockerfile\n          push: true\n          tags: |\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/api:staging\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/api:staging-${{ github.sha }}\n          cache-from: type=gha\n          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max\n\n      - name: Build and push Web\n        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5\n        with:\n          context: .\n          file: ./apps/web/Dockerfile\n          push: true\n          tags: |\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/web:staging\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/web:staging-${{ github.sha }}\n          cache-from: type=gha\n          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max\n\n  deploy:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    needs: build-and-push\n    environment: staging\n\n    steps:\n      - name: Deploy to Staging Server\n        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.3\n        with:\n          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}\n          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}\n          key: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}\n          script: |\n            cd /opt/nucleus-staging\n            docker compose pull\n            docker compose up -d\n            docker system prune -f\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "textEditContent": "name: Deploy to Production\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n\nenv:\n  REGISTRY: ghcr.io\n  IMAGE_PREFIX: ${{ github.repository }}\n\njobs:\n  build-and-push:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    permissions:\n      contents: read\n      packages: write\n\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Log in to Container Registry\n        uses: docker/login-action@v3\n        with:\n          registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}\n          username: ${{ github.actor }}\n          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Set up Docker Buildx\n        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3\n\n      - name: Build and push API\n        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5\n        with:\n          context: .\n          file: ./apps/api/Dockerfile\n          push: true\n          tags: |\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/api:latest\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/api:${{ github.sha }}\n          cache-from: type=gha\n          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max\n\n      - name: Build and push Web\n        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5\n        with:\n          context: .\n          file: ./apps/web/Dockerfile\n          push: true\n          tags: |\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/web:latest\n            ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_PREFIX }}/web:${{ github.sha }}\n          cache-from: type=gha\n          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max\n\n  deploy:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    needs: build-and-push\n    environment: production\n\n    steps:\n      - name: Deploy to Production Server\n        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.3\n        with:\n          host: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}\n          username: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}\n          key: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}\n          script: |\n            cd /opt/nucleus\n            docker compose pull\n            docker compose up -d\n            docker system prune -f\n\n      - name: Notify Deployment\n        if: success()\n        run: |\n          echo \"🚀 Deployed to production successfully!\"\n          # Add Slack/Discord notification here if needed\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/docker-compose.yml)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/docker-compose.yml)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# NUCLEUS BUSINESS SUITE - LOCAL DEVELOPMENT\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# Usage:\n#   Start local DB &amp; Redis:  docker compose --profile local up -d\n#   Stop local services:     docker compose --profile local down\n#   View logs:               docker compose --profile local logs -f\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nversion: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # LOCAL DATABASE (Test environment only)\n  # In Staging/Production, use external service (Neon, Supabase, RDS)\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    profiles: [\"local\"]\n    container_name: nucleus-postgres\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: postgres\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres\n      POSTGRES_DB: nucleus\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U postgres\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # LOCAL REDIS (Test environment only)\n  # In Staging/Production, use external service (Upstash)\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    profiles: [\"local\"]\n    container_name: nucleus-redis\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data:/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    command: redis-server --appendonly yes\n\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # LOCAL MINIO (Optional - S3-compatible storage for testing)\n  # Uncomment if you want to test S3 locally instead of Backblaze\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # minio:\n  #   image: minio/minio\n  #   profiles: [\"local\"]\n  #   container_name: nucleus-minio\n  #   environment:\n  #     MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin\n  #     MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin\n  #   ports:\n  #     - \"9000:9000\"\n  #     - \"9001:9001\"\n  #   volumes:\n  #     - minio_data:/data\n  #   command: server /data --console-address \":9001\"\n\nvolumes:\n  postgres_data:\n  redis_data:\n  # minio_data:\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/docker/docker-compose.deploy.yml)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/docker/docker-compose.deploy.yml)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# NUCLEUS BUSINESS SUITE - DEPLOYMENT (Staging &amp; Production)\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# This file runs ONLY the application containers.\n# Database, Redis, and Storage are EXTERNAL services.\n#\n# Usage:\n#   ENVIRONMENT=staging docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.deploy.yml up -d\n#   ENVIRONMENT=production docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.deploy.yml up -d\n#\n# Required environment variables (set in Komodo or .env.{environment}):\n#   - DATABASE_URL\n#   - REDIS_URL\n#   - S3_* variables\n#   - JWT_SECRET\n#   - DOMAIN\n#   - ACME_EMAIL\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nversion: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # REVERSE PROXY &amp; SSL\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  traefik:\n    image: traefik:v3.0\n    container_name: nucleus-traefik\n    command:\n      # API &amp; Dashboard\n      - \"--api.dashboard=true\"\n      - \"--api.insecure=false\"\n      # Docker provider\n      - \"--providers.docker=true\"\n      - \"--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false\"\n      - \"--providers.docker.network=nucleus\"\n      # Entrypoints\n      - \"--entrypoints.web.address=:80\"\n      - \"--entrypoints.web.http.redirections.entrypoint.to=websecure\"\n      - \"--entrypoints.web.http.redirections.entrypoint.scheme=https\"\n      - \"--entrypoints.websecure.address=:443\"\n      # Let's Encrypt\n      - \"--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge=true\"\n      - \"--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge.entrypoint=web\"\n      - \"--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.email=${ACME_EMAIL}\"\n      - \"--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.storage=/letsencrypt/acme.json\"\n      # Logging\n      - \"--log.level=INFO\"\n      - \"--accesslog=true\"\n    ports:\n      - \"80:80\"\n      - \"443:443\"\n    volumes:\n      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro\n      - letsencrypt:/letsencrypt\n    networks:\n      - nucleus\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    labels:\n      # Dashboard (optional - access via subdomain)\n      - \"traefik.enable=true\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.dashboard.rule=Host(&#96;traefik.${DOMAIN}&#96;)\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.dashboard.entrypoints=websecure\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.dashboard.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.dashboard.service=api@internal\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.dashboard.middlewares=auth\"\n      - \"traefik.http.middlewares.auth.basicauth.users=${TRAEFIK_DASHBOARD_AUTH:-}\"\n\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # API BACKEND (NestJS)\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  api:\n    image: ${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/yourcompany}/nucleus-api:${TAG:-latest}\n    container_name: nucleus-api\n    build:\n      context: ..\n      dockerfile: apps/api/Dockerfile\n    env_file:\n      - ../.env.${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}\n    environment:\n      - NODE_ENV=${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}\n    networks:\n      - nucleus\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:4000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 40s\n    labels:\n      - \"traefik.enable=true\"\n      # HTTP API\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.api.rule=Host(&#96;api.${DOMAIN}&#96;) || Host(&#96;api-${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}.${DOMAIN}&#96;)\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.api.entrypoints=websecure\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.api.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt\"\n      - \"traefik.http.services.api.loadbalancer.server.port=4000\"\n      # WebSocket support\n      - \"traefik.http.middlewares.api-headers.headers.customrequestheaders.X-Forwarded-Proto=https\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.api.middlewares=api-headers\"\n\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  # WEB FRONTEND (Next.js)\n  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  web:\n    image: ${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/yourcompany}/nucleus-web:${TAG:-latest}\n    container_name: nucleus-web\n    build:\n      context: ..\n      dockerfile: apps/web/Dockerfile\n    env_file:\n      - ../.env.${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}\n    environment:\n      - NODE_ENV=${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}\n    networks:\n      - nucleus\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:3000\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 40s\n    labels:\n      - \"traefik.enable=true\"\n      # Main domain\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.web.rule=Host(&#96;${DOMAIN}&#96;) || Host(&#96;www.${DOMAIN}&#96;) || Host(&#96;${ENVIRONMENT:-staging}.${DOMAIN}&#96;)\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.web.entrypoints=websecure\"\n      - \"traefik.http.routers.web.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt\"\n      - \"traefik.http.services.web.loadbalancer.server.port=3000\"\n      # Redirect www to non-www\n      - \"traefik.http.middlewares.www-redirect.redirectregex.regex=^https://www\\\\.(.+)\"\n      - \"traefik.http.middlewares.www-redirect.redirectregex.replacement=https://$${1}\"\n      - \"traefik.http.middlewares.www-redirect.redirectregex.permanent=true\"\n\nvolumes:\n  letsencrypt:\n\nnetworks:\n  nucleus:\n    driver: bridge\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';\nimport { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { SwaggerModule, DocumentBuilder } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { AppModule } from './app.module';\n\nasync function bootstrap() {\n  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule);\n\n  // Global validation pipe\n  app.useGlobalPipes(\n    new ValidationPipe({\n      whitelist: true,\n      transform: true,\n      forbidNonWhitelisted: true,\n    }),\n  );\n\n  // CORS configuration\n  app.enableCors({\n    origin: process.env.CORS_ORIGINS?.split(',') || ['http://localhost:3000'],\n    credentials: true,\n  });\n\n  // Swagger API documentation\n  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {\n    const config = new DocumentBuilder()\n      .setTitle('Nucleus API')\n      .setDescription('Nucleus Business Suite API Documentation')\n      .setVersion('0.1.0')\n      .addBearerAuth()\n      .build();\n    const document = SwaggerModule.createDocument(app, config);\n    SwaggerModule.setup('docs', app, document);\n  }\n\n  const port = process.env.API_PORT || 4000;\n  await app.listen(port);\n  console.log(&#96;🚀 API running on http://localhost:${port}&#96;);\n  console.log(&#96;📚 Docs available at http://localhost:${port}/docs&#96;);\n}\n\nbootstrap();\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// This is your Prisma schema file\n// Learn more: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// USER &amp; AUTHENTICATION\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel User {\n  id            String    @id @default(cuid())\n  email         String    @unique\n  password      String\n  firstName     String\n  lastName      String\n  role          UserRole  @default(STAFF)\n  isActive      Boolean   @default(true)\n  lastLoginAt   DateTime?\n  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  sales         Sale[]\n  refreshTokens RefreshToken[]\n\n  @@map(\"users\")\n}\n\nmodel RefreshToken {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  token     String   @unique\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@map(\"refresh_tokens\")\n}\n\nenum UserRole {\n  ADMIN\n  MANAGER\n  STAFF\n  CASHIER\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// PRODUCTS &amp; INVENTORY\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel Category {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  slug        String    @unique\n  description String?\n  imageUrl    String?\n  parentId    String?\n  parent      Category? @relation(\"CategoryHierarchy\", fields: [parentId], references: [id])\n  children    Category[] @relation(\"CategoryHierarchy\")\n  products    Product[]\n  isActive    Boolean   @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"categories\")\n}\n\nmodel Product {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  slug        String   @unique\n  description String?\n  sku         String   @unique\n  barcode     String?  @unique\n  price       Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  costPrice   Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  stock       Int      @default(0)\n  lowStockThreshold Int @default(10)\n  categoryId  String?\n  category    Category? @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])\n  imageUrl    String?\n  images      ProductImage[]\n  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)\n  isFeatured  Boolean  @default(false)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  saleItems   SaleItem[]\n  stockMovements StockMovement[]\n\n  @@map(\"products\")\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  sortOrder Int     @default(0)\n\n  @@map(\"product_images\")\n}\n\nmodel StockMovement {\n  id          String        @id @default(cuid())\n  productId   String\n  product     Product       @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  type        MovementType\n  quantity    Int\n  reason      String?\n  reference   String?       // Sale ID, PO number, etc.\n  createdAt   DateTime      @default(now())\n\n  @@map(\"stock_movements\")\n}\n\nenum MovementType {\n  IN          // Stock received\n  OUT         // Sold or removed\n  ADJUSTMENT  // Manual adjustment\n  RETURN      // Customer return\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CUSTOMERS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel Customer {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  email       String?  @unique\n  phone       String?\n  firstName   String\n  lastName    String\n  company     String?\n  address     String?\n  city        String?\n  state       String?\n  postalCode  String?\n  country     String?  @default(\"PH\")\n  notes       String?\n  loyaltyPoints Int    @default(0)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  sales       Sale[]\n  orders      Order[]\n\n  @@map(\"customers\")\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// SALES (POS)\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel Sale {\n  id            String      @id @default(cuid())\n  receiptNumber String      @unique\n  customerId    String?\n  customer      Customer?   @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  userId        String\n  user          User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  items         SaleItem[]\n  payments      Payment[]\n  subtotal      Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  taxAmount     Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  discountAmount Decimal    @db.Decimal(10, 2) @default(0)\n  total         Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  status        SaleStatus  @default(COMPLETED)\n  notes         String?\n  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime    @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"sales\")\n}\n\nmodel SaleItem {\n  id          String  @id @default(cuid())\n  saleId      String\n  sale        Sale    @relation(fields: [saleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  productId   String\n  product     Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  quantity    Int\n  unitPrice   Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  discount    Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2) @default(0)\n  total       Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n\n  @@map(\"sale_items\")\n}\n\nmodel Payment {\n  id          String        @id @default(cuid())\n  saleId      String\n  sale        Sale          @relation(fields: [saleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  method      PaymentMethod\n  amount      Decimal       @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  reference   String?       // Card last 4, check number, etc.\n  createdAt   DateTime      @default(now())\n\n  @@map(\"payments\")\n}\n\nenum SaleStatus {\n  PENDING\n  COMPLETED\n  REFUNDED\n  VOID\n}\n\nenum PaymentMethod {\n  CASH\n  CARD\n  GCASH\n  MAYA\n  BANK_TRANSFER\n  CHECK\n  CREDIT\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ECOMMERCE ORDERS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel Order {\n  id              String      @id @default(cuid())\n  orderNumber     String      @unique\n  customerId      String?\n  customer        Customer?   @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  items           OrderItem[]\n  subtotal        Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  shippingAmount  Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2) @default(0)\n  taxAmount       Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  total           Decimal     @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  status          OrderStatus @default(PENDING)\n  paymentStatus   PaymentStatus @default(PENDING)\n  shippingAddress String?\n  shippingCity    String?\n  shippingState   String?\n  shippingPostal  String?\n  shippingCountry String?\n  notes           String?\n  createdAt       DateTime    @default(now())\n  updatedAt       DateTime    @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"orders\")\n}\n\nmodel OrderItem {\n  id          String  @id @default(cuid())\n  orderId     String\n  order       Order   @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  productId   String\n  productName String  // Snapshot of product name\n  quantity    Int\n  unitPrice   Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n  total       Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n\n  @@map(\"order_items\")\n}\n\nenum OrderStatus {\n  PENDING\n  CONFIRMED\n  PROCESSING\n  SHIPPED\n  DELIVERED\n  CANCELLED\n}\n\nenum PaymentStatus {\n  PENDING\n  PAID\n  FAILED\n  REFUNDED\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// SETTINGS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nmodel Setting {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  key       String   @unique\n  value     String\n  type      String   @default(\"string\") // string, number, boolean, json\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"settings\")\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/prisma/seed.ts)",

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { PrismaClient, UserRole } from '@prisma/client';\nimport * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\n\nconst prisma = new PrismaClient();\n\nasync function main() {\n  console.log('🌱 Seeding database...');\n\n  // Create admin user\n  const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash('admin123', 10);\n  \n  const admin = await prisma.user.upsert({\n    where: { email: 'admin@nucleus.local' },\n    update: {},\n    create: {\n      email: 'admin@nucleus.local',\n      password: hashedPassword,\n      firstName: 'Admin',\n      lastName: 'User',\n      role: UserRole.ADMIN,\n    },\n  });\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email}&#96;);\n\n  // Create categories\n  const categories = await Promise.all([\n    prisma.category.upsert({\n      where: { slug: 'electronics' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'Electronics',\n        slug: 'electronics',\n        description: 'Electronic devices and gadgets',\n      },\n    }),\n    prisma.category.upsert({\n      where: { slug: 'clothing' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'Clothing',\n        slug: 'clothing',\n        description: 'Apparel and accessories',\n      },\n    }),\n    prisma.category.upsert({\n      where: { slug: 'groceries' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'Groceries',\n        slug: 'groceries',\n        description: 'Food and household items',\n      },\n    }),\n  ]);\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Created ${categories.length} categories&#96;);\n\n  // Create sample products\n  const products = await Promise.all([\n    prisma.product.upsert({\n      where: { sku: 'ELEC-001' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'Wireless Mouse',\n        slug: 'wireless-mouse',\n        sku: 'ELEC-001',\n        barcode: '1234567890123',\n        price: 599.00,\n        costPrice: 350.00,\n        stock: 50,\n        categoryId: categories[0].id,\n        description: 'Ergonomic wireless mouse with USB receiver',\n      },\n    }),\n    prisma.product.upsert({\n      where: { sku: 'ELEC-002' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'USB-C Hub',\n        slug: 'usb-c-hub',\n        sku: 'ELEC-002',\n        barcode: '1234567890124',\n        price: 1299.00,\n        costPrice: 800.00,\n        stock: 30,\n        categoryId: categories[0].id,\n        description: '7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI and card reader',\n      },\n    }),\n    prisma.product.upsert({\n      where: { sku: 'CLTH-001' },\n      update: {},\n      create: {\n        name: 'Cotton T-Shirt',\n        slug: 'cotton-t-shirt',\n        sku: 'CLTH-001',\n        barcode: '1234567890125',\n        price: 399.00,\n        costPrice: 150.00,\n        stock: 100,\n        categoryId: categories[1].id,\n        description: 'Comfortable 100% cotton t-shirt',\n      },\n    }),\n  ]);\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Created ${products.length} products&#96;);\n\n  // Create default settings\n  const settings = await Promise.all([\n    prisma.setting.upsert({\n      where: { key: 'company_name' },\n      update: {},\n      create: { key: 'company_name', value: 'Nucleus Business', type: 'string' },\n    }),\n    prisma.setting.upsert({\n      where: { key: 'tax_rate' },\n      update: {},\n      create: { key: 'tax_rate', value: '12', type: 'number' },\n    }),\n    prisma.setting.upsert({\n      where: { key: 'currency' },\n      update: {},\n      create: { key: 'currency', value: 'PHP', type: 'string' },\n    }),\n  ]);\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Created ${settings.length} settings&#96;);\n\n  console.log('✅ Seeding complete!');\n}\n\nmain()\n  .catch((e) =&gt; {\n    console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', e);\n    process.exit(1);\n  })\n  .finally(async () =&gt; {\n    await prisma.$disconnect();\n  });\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/common/redis/redis.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/common/redis/redis.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, OnModuleDestroy } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';\nimport Redis from 'ioredis';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class RedisService implements OnModuleDestroy {\n  private readonly client: Redis;\n\n  constructor(private configService: ConfigService) {\n    this.client = new Redis(this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('REDIS_URL') || 'redis://localhost:6379');\n  }\n\n  getClient(): Redis {\n    return this.client;\n  }\n\n  async get(key: string): Promise&lt;string | null&gt; {\n    return this.client.get(key);\n  }\n\n  async set(key: string, value: string, ttlSeconds?: number): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n    if (ttlSeconds) {\n      await this.client.set(key, value, 'EX', ttlSeconds);\n    } else {\n      await this.client.set(key, value);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async del(key: string): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n    await this.client.del(key);\n  }\n\n  async publish(channel: string, message: string): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n    await this.client.publish(channel, message);\n  }\n\n  onModuleDestroy() {\n    this.client.disconnect();\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "isConfirmed": {
```

```json
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation } from '@nestjs/swagger';\n\n@ApiTags('Health')\n@Controller('health')\nexport class HealthController {\n  @Get()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Health check endpoint' })\n  check() {\n    return {\n      status: 'ok',\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n      uptime: process.uptime(),\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { JwtModule } from '@nestjs/jwt';\nimport { PassportModule } from '@nestjs/passport';\nimport { ConfigModule, ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';\nimport { AuthController } from './auth.controller';\nimport { AuthService } from './auth.service';\nimport { JwtStrategy } from './strategies/jwt.strategy';\nimport { UsersModule } from '../users/users.module';\n\n@Module({\n  imports: [\n    UsersModule,\n    PassportModule.register({ defaultStrategy: 'jwt' }),\n    JwtModule.registerAsync({\n      imports: [ConfigModule],\n      useFactory: async (configService: ConfigService) =&gt; ({\n        secret: configService.get&lt;string&gt;('JWT_SECRET'),\n        signOptions: {\n          expiresIn: configService.get&lt;string&gt;('JWT_EXPIRES_IN') || '15m',\n        },\n      }),\n      inject: [ConfigService],\n    }),\n  ],\n  controllers: [AuthController],\n  providers: [AuthService, JwtStrategy],\n  exports: [AuthService],\n})\nexport class AuthModule {}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="copilot_createFile">

```json
}
```
Additional data:

```json
{
  "vscodeToolId": "copilot_createFile",
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/auth.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/auth.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, UnauthorizedException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { JwtService } from '@nestjs/jwt';\nimport { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';\nimport * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { LoginDto } from './dto/login.dto';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class AuthService {\n  constructor(\n    private prisma: PrismaService,\n    private jwtService: JwtService,\n    private configService: ConfigService,\n  ) {}\n\n  async login(dto: LoginDto) {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { email: dto.email },\n    });\n\n    if (!user || !user.isActive) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid credentials');\n    }\n\n    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(dto.password, user.password);\n    if (!isPasswordValid) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid credentials');\n    }\n\n    // Update last login\n    await this.prisma.user.update({\n      where: { id: user.id },\n      data: { lastLoginAt: new Date() },\n    });\n\n    const tokens = await this.generateTokens(user.id, user.email, user.role);\n\n    return {\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        email: user.email,\n        firstName: user.firstName,\n        lastName: user.lastName,\n        role: user.role,\n      },\n      ...tokens,\n    };\n  }\n\n  async refreshTokens(refreshToken: string) {\n    const tokenRecord = await this.prisma.refreshToken.findUnique({\n      where: { token: refreshToken },\n      include: { user: true },\n    });\n\n    if (!tokenRecord || tokenRecord.expiresAt &lt; new Date()) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid refresh token');\n    }\n\n    // Delete old refresh token\n    await this.prisma.refreshToken.delete({\n      where: { id: tokenRecord.id },\n    });\n\n    return this.generateTokens(\n      tokenRecord.user.id,\n      tokenRecord.user.email,\n      tokenRecord.user.role,\n    );\n  }\n\n  async logout(userId: string) {\n    await this.prisma.refreshToken.deleteMany({\n      where: { userId },\n    });\n    return { message: 'Logged out successfully' };\n  }\n\n  private async generateTokens(userId: string, email: string, role: string) {\n    const payload = { sub: userId, email, role };\n\n    const accessToken = this.jwtService.sign(payload);\n\n    // Generate refresh token\n    const refreshToken = this.jwtService.sign(payload, {\n      expiresIn: this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN') || '7d',\n    });\n\n    // Store refresh token\n    const expiresAt = new Date();\n    expiresAt.setDate(expiresAt.getDate() + 7);\n\n    await this.prisma.refreshToken.create({\n      data: {\n        token: refreshToken,\n        userId,\n        expiresAt,\n      },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      accessToken,\n      refreshToken,\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/auth.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/auth.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Post, Body, UseGuards, Req } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { AuthService } from './auth.service';\nimport { LoginDto } from './dto/login.dto';\nimport { RefreshTokenDto } from './dto/refresh-token.dto';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@ApiTags('Auth')\n@Controller('auth')\nexport class AuthController {\n  constructor(private authService: AuthService) {}\n\n  @Post('login')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Login with email and password' })\n  login(@Body() dto: LoginDto) {\n    return this.authService.login(dto);\n  }\n\n  @Post('refresh')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Refresh access token' })\n  refresh(@Body() dto: RefreshTokenDto) {\n    return this.authService.refreshTokens(dto.refreshToken);\n  }\n\n  @Post('logout')\n  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n  @ApiBearerAuth()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Logout and invalidate refresh tokens' })\n  logout(@Req() req: any) {\n    return this.authService.logout(req.user.id);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/strategies/jwt.strategy.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/auth/strategies/jwt.strategy.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, UnauthorizedException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PassportStrategy } from '@nestjs/passport';\nimport { ExtractJwt, Strategy } from 'passport-jwt';\nimport { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class JwtStrategy extends PassportStrategy(Strategy) {\n  constructor(\n    private configService: ConfigService,\n    private prisma: PrismaService,\n  ) {\n    super({\n      jwtFromRequest: ExtractJwt.fromAuthHeaderAsBearerToken(),\n      ignoreExpiration: false,\n      secretOrKey: configService.get&lt;string&gt;('JWT_SECRET'),\n    });\n  }\n\n  async validate(payload: { sub: string; email: string; role: string }) {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { id: payload.sub },\n    });\n\n    if (!user || !user.isActive) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException();\n    }\n\n    return {\n      id: user.id,\n      email: user.email,\n      role: user.role,\n      firstName: user.firstName,\n      lastName: user.lastName,\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/users/users.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/users/users.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, NotFoundException, ConflictException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { CreateUserDto } from './dto/create-user.dto';\nimport { UpdateUserDto } from './dto/update-user.dto';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class UsersService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll() {\n    return this.prisma.user.findMany({\n      select: {\n        id: true,\n        email: true,\n        firstName: true,\n        lastName: true,\n        role: true,\n        isActive: true,\n        lastLoginAt: true,\n        createdAt: true,\n      },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findById(id: string) {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      select: {\n        id: true,\n        email: true,\n        firstName: true,\n        lastName: true,\n        role: true,\n        isActive: true,\n        lastLoginAt: true,\n        createdAt: true,\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!user) {\n      throw new NotFoundException('User not found');\n    }\n\n    return user;\n  }\n\n  async findByEmail(email: string) {\n    return this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { email },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async create(dto: CreateUserDto) {\n    const existing = await this.findByEmail(dto.email);\n    if (existing) {\n      throw new ConflictException('Email already exists');\n    }\n\n    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(dto.password, 10);\n\n    return this.prisma.user.create({\n      data: {\n        ...dto,\n        password: hashedPassword,\n      },\n      select: {\n        id: true,\n        email: true,\n        firstName: true,\n        lastName: true,\n        role: true,\n        isActive: true,\n        createdAt: true,\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async update(id: string, dto: UpdateUserDto) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n\n    const data: any = { ...dto };\n    if (dto.password) {\n      data.password = await bcrypt.hash(dto.password, 10);\n    }\n\n    return this.prisma.user.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data,\n      select: {\n        id: true,\n        email: true,\n        firstName: true,\n        lastName: true,\n        role: true,\n        isActive: true,\n        createdAt: true,\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async delete(id: string) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n    await this.prisma.user.delete({ where: { id } });\n    return { message: 'User deleted successfully' };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/users/users.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/users/users.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Patch, Delete, Body, Param, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { UsersService } from './users.service';\nimport { CreateUserDto } from './dto/create-user.dto';\nimport { UpdateUserDto } from './dto/update-user.dto';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@ApiTags('Users')\n@ApiBearerAuth()\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n@Controller('users')\nexport class UsersController {\n  constructor(private usersService: UsersService) {}\n\n  @Get()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all users' })\n  findAll() {\n    return this.usersService.findAll();\n  }\n\n  @Get(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get user by ID' })\n  findById(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.usersService.findById(id);\n  }\n\n  @Post()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Create new user' })\n  create(@Body() dto: CreateUserDto) {\n    return this.usersService.create(dto);\n  }\n\n  @Patch(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Update user' })\n  update(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateUserDto) {\n    return this.usersService.update(id, dto);\n  }\n\n  @Delete(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Delete user' })\n  delete(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.usersService.delete(id);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { IsEmail, IsString, MinLength, IsEnum, IsOptional, IsBoolean } from 'class-validator';\nimport { ApiProperty, ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { UserRole } from '@prisma/client';\n\nexport class CreateUserDto {\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'john@example.com' })\n  @IsEmail()\n  email: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'password123' })\n  @IsString()\n  @MinLength(6)\n  password: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'John' })\n  @IsString()\n  firstName: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'Doe' })\n  @IsString()\n  lastName: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ enum: UserRole, default: UserRole.STAFF })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsEnum(UserRole)\n  role?: UserRole;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ default: true })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsBoolean()\n  isActive?: boolean;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/products.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/products.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, NotFoundException, ConflictException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { CreateProductDto } from './dto/create-product.dto';\nimport { UpdateProductDto } from './dto/update-product.dto';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class ProductsService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(params?: { categoryId?: string; search?: string; isActive?: boolean }) {\n    const where: any = {};\n    \n    if (params?.categoryId) {\n      where.categoryId = params.categoryId;\n    }\n    if (params?.isActive !== undefined) {\n      where.isActive = params.isActive;\n    }\n    if (params?.search) {\n      where.OR = [\n        { name: { contains: params.search, mode: 'insensitive' } },\n        { sku: { contains: params.search, mode: 'insensitive' } },\n        { barcode: { contains: params.search } },\n      ];\n    }\n\n    return this.prisma.product.findMany({\n      where,\n      include: {\n        category: { select: { id: true, name: true, slug: true } },\n        images: { orderBy: { sortOrder: 'asc' } },\n      },\n      orderBy: { name: 'asc' },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findById(id: string) {\n    const product = await this.prisma.product.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: {\n        category: true,\n        images: { orderBy: { sortOrder: 'asc' } },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!product) {\n      throw new NotFoundException('Product not found');\n    }\n\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  async findByBarcode(barcode: string) {\n    const product = await this.prisma.product.findUnique({\n      where: { barcode },\n      include: { category: true },\n    });\n\n    if (!product) {\n      throw new NotFoundException('Product not found');\n    }\n\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  async create(dto: CreateProductDto) {\n    // Check for duplicate SKU\n    const existingSku = await this.prisma.product.findUnique({\n      where: { sku: dto.sku },\n    });\n    if (existingSku) {\n      throw new ConflictException('SKU already exists');\n    }\n\n    // Check for duplicate barcode if provided\n    if (dto.barcode) {\n      const existingBarcode = await this.prisma.product.findUnique({\n        where: { barcode: dto.barcode },\n      });\n      if (existingBarcode) {\n        throw new ConflictException('Barcode already exists');\n      }\n    }\n\n    return this.prisma.product.create({\n      data: dto,\n      include: { category: true },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async update(id: string, dto: UpdateProductDto) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n\n    return this.prisma.product.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: dto,\n      include: { category: true },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async delete(id: string) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n    await this.prisma.product.delete({ where: { id } });\n    return { message: 'Product deleted successfully' };\n  }\n\n  async updateStock(id: string, quantity: number, type: 'IN' | 'OUT' | 'ADJUSTMENT', reason?: string) {\n    const product = await this.findById(id);\n    \n    const newStock = type === 'OUT' \n      ? product.stock - quantity \n      : product.stock + quantity;\n\n    // Create stock movement record\n    await this.prisma.stockMovement.create({\n      data: {\n        productId: id,\n        type,\n        quantity,\n        reason,\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Update product stock\n    return this.prisma.product.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: { stock: newStock },\n    });\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/products.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/products.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Patch, Delete, Body, Param, Query, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth, ApiQuery } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { ProductsService } from './products.service';\nimport { CreateProductDto } from './dto/create-product.dto';\nimport { UpdateProductDto } from './dto/update-product.dto';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@ApiTags('Products')\n@Controller('products')\nexport class ProductsController {\n  constructor(private productsService: ProductsService) {}\n\n  @Get()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all products' })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'categoryId', required: false })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'search', required: false })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'isActive', required: false, type: Boolean })\n  findAll(\n    @Query('categoryId') categoryId?: string,\n    @Query('search') search?: string,\n    @Query('isActive') isActive?: string,\n  ) {\n    return this.productsService.findAll({\n      categoryId,\n      search,\n      isActive: isActive === 'true' ? true : isActive === 'false' ? false : undefined,\n    });\n  }\n\n  @Get('barcode/:barcode')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get product by barcode (for POS scanner)' })\n  findByBarcode(@Param('barcode') barcode: string) {\n    return this.productsService.findByBarcode(barcode);\n  }\n\n  @Get(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get product by ID' })\n  findById(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.productsService.findById(id);\n  }\n\n  @Post()\n  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n  @ApiBearerAuth()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Create new product' })\n  create(@Body() dto: CreateProductDto) {\n    return this.productsService.create(dto);\n  }\n\n  @Patch(':id')\n  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n  @ApiBearerAuth()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Update product' })\n  update(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateProductDto) {\n    return this.productsService.update(id, dto);\n  }\n\n  @Delete(':id')\n  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n  @ApiBearerAuth()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Delete product' })\n  delete(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.productsService.delete(id);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/dto/create-product.dto.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/products/dto/create-product.dto.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { IsString, IsNumber, IsOptional, IsBoolean, Min } from 'class-validator';\nimport { ApiProperty, ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { Type } from 'class-transformer';\n\nexport class CreateProductDto {\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'Wireless Mouse' })\n  @IsString()\n  name: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'wireless-mouse' })\n  @IsString()\n  slug: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  description?: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'ELEC-001' })\n  @IsString()\n  sku: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: '1234567890123' })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  barcode?: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 599.00 })\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Type(() =&gt; Number)\n  @Min(0)\n  price: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: 350.00 })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Type(() =&gt; Number)\n  @Min(0)\n  costPrice?: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ default: 0 })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Type(() =&gt; Number)\n  @Min(0)\n  stock?: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ default: 10 })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Type(() =&gt; Number)\n  @Min(0)\n  lowStockThreshold?: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  categoryId?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  imageUrl?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ default: true })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsBoolean()\n  isActive?: boolean;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ default: false })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsBoolean()\n  isFeatured?: boolean;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="copilot_createFile">

Parameters:

```json
  "file_path": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\inventory\\inventory.service.ts",
  "relativeWorkspacePath": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\inventory\\inventory.service.ts"
}
```
Additional data:

```json
{
  "vscodeToolId": "copilot_createFile",
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/inventory/inventory.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/inventory/inventory.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { MovementType } from '@prisma/client';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class InventoryService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async getLowStockProducts() {\n    return this.prisma.product.findMany({\n      where: {\n        isActive: true,\n        stock: {\n          lte: this.prisma.product.fields.lowStockThreshold,\n        },\n      },\n      include: {\n        category: { select: { id: true, name: true } },\n      },\n      orderBy: { stock: 'asc' },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async getStockMovements(productId?: string, type?: MovementType) {\n    const where: any = {};\n    if (productId) where.productId = productId;\n    if (type) where.type = type;\n\n    return this.prisma.stockMovement.findMany({\n      where,\n      include: {\n        product: { select: { id: true, name: true, sku: true } },\n      },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n      take: 100,\n    });\n  }\n\n  async adjustStock(productId: string, quantity: number, type: MovementType, reason?: string) {\n    const product = await this.prisma.product.findUnique({\n      where: { id: productId },\n    });\n\n    if (!product) {\n      throw new Error('Product not found');\n    }\n\n    let newStock = product.stock;\n    if (type === 'IN' || type === 'RETURN') {\n      newStock += quantity;\n    } else if (type === 'OUT') {\n      newStock -= quantity;\n    } else if (type === 'ADJUSTMENT') {\n      newStock = quantity; // Direct set for adjustments\n    }\n\n    // Create movement record\n    await this.prisma.stockMovement.create({\n      data: {\n        productId,\n        type,\n        quantity,\n        reason,\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Update stock\n    return this.prisma.product.update({\n      where: { id: productId },\n      data: { stock: newStock },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async getInventorySummary() {\n    const [totalProducts, lowStock, outOfStock, totalValue] = await Promise.all([\n      this.prisma.product.count({ where: { isActive: true } }),\n      this.prisma.product.count({\n        where: {\n          isActive: true,\n          stock: { gt: 0, lte: 10 }, // Simplified low stock check\n        },\n      }),\n      this.prisma.product.count({\n        where: { isActive: true, stock: 0 },\n      }),\n      this.prisma.product.aggregate({\n        where: { isActive: true },\n        _sum: {\n          stock: true,\n        },\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    return {\n      totalProducts,\n      lowStock,\n      outOfStock,\n      totalUnits: totalValue._sum.stock || 0,\n    };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="copilot_createFile">

```json
}
```

```json
{

  "isHidden": false
```

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/inventory/inventory.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/inventory/inventory.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Query, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth, ApiQuery } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { InventoryService } from './inventory.service';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\nimport { AdjustStockDto } from './dto/adjust-stock.dto';\n\n@ApiTags('Inventory')\n@ApiBearerAuth()\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n@Controller('inventory')\nexport class InventoryController {\n  constructor(private inventoryService: InventoryService) {}\n\n  @Get('summary')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get inventory summary' })\n  getSummary() {\n    return this.inventoryService.getInventorySummary();\n  }\n\n  @Get('low-stock')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get products with low stock' })\n  getLowStock() {\n    return this.inventoryService.getLowStockProducts();\n  }\n\n  @Get('movements')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get stock movements' })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'productId', required: false })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'type', required: false, enum: ['IN', 'OUT', 'ADJUSTMENT', 'RETURN'] })\n  getMovements(\n    @Query('productId') productId?: string,\n    @Query('type') type?: 'IN' | 'OUT' | 'ADJUSTMENT' | 'RETURN',\n  ) {\n    return this.inventoryService.getStockMovements(productId, type);\n  }\n\n  @Post('adjust')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Adjust product stock' })\n  adjustStock(@Body() dto: AdjustStockDto) {\n    return this.inventoryService.adjustStock(\n      dto.productId,\n      dto.quantity,\n      dto.type,\n      dto.reason,\n    );\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "textEditContent": "import { IsString, IsNumber, IsEnum, IsOptional, Min } from 'class-validator';\nimport { ApiProperty, ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { MovementType } from '@prisma/client';\n\nexport class AdjustStockDto {\n  @ApiProperty()\n  @IsString()\n  productId: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 10 })\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(0)\n  quantity: number;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ enum: ['IN', 'OUT', 'ADJUSTMENT', 'RETURN'] })\n  @IsEnum(MovementType)\n  type: MovementType;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: 'Stock count correction' })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  reason?: string;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="copilot_createFile">

```json
}
```
Additional data:
