```json
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, BadRequestException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { CreateSaleDto } from './dto/create-sale.dto';\nimport { Decimal } from '@prisma/client/runtime/library';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class SalesService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(params?: { startDate?: Date; endDate?: Date; userId?: string }) {\n    const where: any = {};\n    \n    if (params?.startDate || params?.endDate) {\n      where.createdAt = {};\n      if (params.startDate) where.createdAt.gte = params.startDate;\n      if (params.endDate) where.createdAt.lte = params.endDate;\n    }\n    if (params?.userId) {\n      where.userId = params.userId;\n    }\n\n    return this.prisma.sale.findMany({\n      where,\n      include: {\n        items: {\n          include: {\n            product: { select: { id: true, name: true, sku: true } },\n          },\n        },\n        payments: true,\n        customer: { select: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true } },\n        user: { select: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true } },\n      },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n      take: 100,\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findById(id: string) {\n    return this.prisma.sale.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: {\n        items: {\n          include: {\n            product: true,\n          },\n        },\n        payments: true,\n        customer: true,\n        user: { select: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true } },\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async create(dto: CreateSaleDto, userId: string) {\n    // Generate receipt number\n    const receiptNumber = await this.generateReceiptNumber();\n\n    // Calculate totals\n    let subtotal = new Decimal(0);\n    const itemsWithTotals = dto.items.map(item =&gt; {\n      const itemTotal = new Decimal(item.unitPrice).mul(item.quantity).sub(item.discount || 0);\n      subtotal = subtotal.add(itemTotal);\n      return { ...item, total: itemTotal };\n    });\n\n    const taxRate = new Decimal(0.12); // 12% VAT - should come from settings\n    const taxAmount = subtotal.mul(taxRate);\n    const total = subtotal.add(taxAmount).sub(dto.discountAmount || 0);\n\n    // Validate payment\n    const totalPayment = dto.payments.reduce(\n      (sum, p) =&gt; sum.add(new Decimal(p.amount)),\n      new Decimal(0)\n    );\n    if (totalPayment.lessThan(total)) {\n      throw new BadRequestException('Payment amount is less than total');\n    }\n\n    // Create sale with items and payments\n    const sale = await this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) =&gt; {\n      // Create the sale\n      const newSale = await tx.sale.create({\n        data: {\n          receiptNumber,\n          userId,\n          customerId: dto.customerId,\n          subtotal,\n          taxAmount,\n          discountAmount: dto.discountAmount || 0,\n          total,\n          notes: dto.notes,\n          items: {\n            create: itemsWithTotals.map(item =&gt; ({\n              productId: item.productId,\n              quantity: item.quantity,\n              unitPrice: item.unitPrice,\n              discount: item.discount || 0,\n              total: item.total,\n            })),\n          },\n          payments: {\n            create: dto.payments.map(p =&gt; ({\n              method: p.method,\n              amount: p.amount,\n              reference: p.reference,\n            })),\n          },\n        },\n        include: {\n          items: { include: { product: true } },\n          payments: true,\n          customer: true,\n        },\n      });\n\n      // Update inventory\n      for (const item of dto.items) {\n        await tx.product.update({\n          where: { id: item.productId },\n          data: { stock: { decrement: item.quantity } },\n        });\n\n        await tx.stockMovement.create({\n          data: {\n            productId: item.productId,\n            type: 'OUT',\n            quantity: item.quantity,\n            reference: receiptNumber,\n            reason: 'Sale',\n          },\n        });\n      }\n\n      return newSale;\n    });\n\n    return sale;\n  }\n\n  async getTodaySummary() {\n    const today = new Date();\n    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n    const tomorrow = new Date(today);\n    tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1);\n\n    const [sales, totalRevenue, transactionCount] = await Promise.all([\n      this.prisma.sale.findMany({\n        where: {\n          createdAt: { gte: today, lt: tomorrow },\n          status: 'COMPLETED',\n        },\n      }),\n      this.prisma.sale.aggregate({\n        where: {\n          createdAt: { gte: today, lt: tomorrow },\n          status: 'COMPLETED',\n        },\n        _sum: { total: true },\n      }),\n      this.prisma.sale.count({\n        where: {\n          createdAt: { gte: today, lt: tomorrow },\n          status: 'COMPLETED',\n        },\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    return {\n      date: today.toISOString().split('T')[0],\n      totalRevenue: totalRevenue._sum.total || 0,\n      transactionCount,\n      averageTransaction: transactionCount &gt; 0 \n        ? Number(totalRevenue._sum.total || 0) / transactionCount \n        : 0,\n    };\n  }\n\n  private async generateReceiptNumber(): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\n    const today = new Date();\n    const prefix = today.toISOString().slice(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');\n    \n    const lastSale = await this.prisma.sale.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        receiptNumber: { startsWith: prefix },\n      },\n      orderBy: { receiptNumber: 'desc' },\n    });\n\n    let sequence = 1;\n    if (lastSale) {\n      const lastSequence = parseInt(lastSale.receiptNumber.slice(-4));\n      sequence = lastSequence + 1;\n    }\n\n    return &#96;${prefix}-${sequence.toString().padStart(4, '0')}&#96;;\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Param, Query, UseGuards, Req } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { SalesService } from './sales.service';\nimport { CreateSaleDto } from './dto/create-sale.dto';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\nimport { SalesGateway } from './sales.gateway';\n\n@ApiTags('Sales')\n@ApiBearerAuth()\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n@Controller('sales')\nexport class SalesController {\n  constructor(\n    private salesService: SalesService,\n    private salesGateway: SalesGateway,\n  ) {}\n\n  @Get()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all sales' })\n  findAll(\n    @Query('startDate') startDate?: string,\n    @Query('endDate') endDate?: string,\n    @Query('userId') userId?: string,\n  ) {\n    return this.salesService.findAll({\n      startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : undefined,\n      endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : undefined,\n      userId,\n    });\n  }\n\n  @Get('today')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get today\\'s sales summary' })\n  getTodaySummary() {\n    return this.salesService.getTodaySummary();\n  }\n\n  @Get(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get sale by ID' })\n  findById(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.salesService.findById(id);\n  }\n\n  @Post()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Create new sale (POS checkout)' })\n  async create(@Body() dto: CreateSaleDto, @Req() req: any) {\n    const sale = await this.salesService.create(dto, req.user.id);\n    \n    // Broadcast to monitoring dashboard\n    this.salesGateway.broadcastNewSale(sale);\n    \n    return sale;\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.gateway.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/sales.gateway.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import {\n  WebSocketGateway,\n  WebSocketServer,\n  OnGatewayConnection,\n  OnGatewayDisconnect,\n} from '@nestjs/websockets';\nimport { Server, Socket } from 'socket.io';\n\n@WebSocketGateway({\n  cors: {\n    origin: process.env.CORS_ORIGINS?.split(',') || ['http://localhost:3000'],\n    credentials: true,\n  },\n})\nexport class SalesGateway implements OnGatewayConnection, OnGatewayDisconnect {\n  @WebSocketServer()\n  server: Server;\n\n  handleConnection(client: Socket) {\n    console.log(&#96;Client connected: ${client.id}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  handleDisconnect(client: Socket) {\n    console.log(&#96;Client disconnected: ${client.id}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  broadcastNewSale(sale: any) {\n    this.server.emit('sale:created', {\n      id: sale.id,\n      receiptNumber: sale.receiptNumber,\n      total: sale.total,\n      itemCount: sale.items?.length || 0,\n      createdAt: sale.createdAt,\n    });\n  }\n\n  broadcastInventoryUpdate(product: any) {\n    this.server.emit('inventory:updated', {\n      productId: product.id,\n      name: product.name,\n      stock: product.stock,\n    });\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/dto/create-sale.dto.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/sales/dto/create-sale.dto.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { IsString, IsNumber, IsArray, IsOptional, ValidateNested, IsEnum, Min } from 'class-validator';\nimport { ApiProperty, ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { Type } from 'class-transformer';\nimport { PaymentMethod } from '@prisma/client';\n\nclass SaleItemDto {\n  @ApiProperty()\n  @IsString()\n  productId: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 2 })\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(1)\n  quantity: number;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 599.00 })\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(0)\n  unitPrice: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: 0 })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(0)\n  discount?: number;\n}\n\nclass PaymentDto {\n  @ApiProperty({ enum: PaymentMethod })\n  @IsEnum(PaymentMethod)\n  method: PaymentMethod;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 1000.00 })\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(0)\n  amount: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: '1234' })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  reference?: string;\n}\n\nexport class CreateSaleDto {\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  customerId?: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ type: [SaleItemDto] })\n  @IsArray()\n  @ValidateNested({ each: true })\n  @Type(() =&gt; SaleItemDto)\n  items: SaleItemDto[];\n\n  @ApiProperty({ type: [PaymentDto] })\n  @IsArray()\n  @ValidateNested({ each: true })\n  @Type(() =&gt; PaymentDto)\n  payments: PaymentDto[];\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: 0 })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsNumber()\n  @Min(0)\n  discountAmount?: number;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  notes?: string;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/customers/customers.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/customers/customers.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../../common/prisma/prisma.service';\nimport { CreateCustomerDto } from './dto/create-customer.dto';\nimport { UpdateCustomerDto } from './dto/update-customer.dto';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class CustomersService {\n  constructor(private prisma: PrismaService) {}\n\n  async findAll(search?: string) {\n    const where = search\n      ? {\n          OR: [\n            { firstName: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },\n            { lastName: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },\n            { email: { contains: search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },\n            { phone: { contains: search } },\n          ],\n        }\n      : {};\n\n    return this.prisma.customer.findMany({\n      where,\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async findById(id: string) {\n    const customer = await this.prisma.customer.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: {\n        sales: {\n          take: 10,\n          orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n          select: {\n            id: true,\n            receiptNumber: true,\n            total: true,\n            createdAt: true,\n          },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!customer) {\n      throw new NotFoundException('Customer not found');\n    }\n\n    return customer;\n  }\n\n  async create(dto: CreateCustomerDto) {\n    return this.prisma.customer.create({\n      data: dto,\n    });\n  }\n\n  async update(id: string, dto: UpdateCustomerDto) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n    return this.prisma.customer.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: dto,\n    });\n  }\n\n  async delete(id: string) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n    await this.prisma.customer.delete({ where: { id } });\n    return { message: 'Customer deleted successfully' };\n  }\n\n  async addLoyaltyPoints(id: string, points: number) {\n    await this.findById(id);\n    return this.prisma.customer.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: { loyaltyPoints: { increment: points } },\n    });\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Controller, Get, Post, Patch, Delete, Body, Param, Query, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth, ApiQuery } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { CustomersService } from './customers.service';\nimport { CreateCustomerDto } from './dto/create-customer.dto';\nimport { UpdateCustomerDto } from './dto/update-customer.dto';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@ApiTags('Customers')\n@ApiBearerAuth()\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n@Controller('customers')\nexport class CustomersController {\n  constructor(private customersService: CustomersService) {}\n\n  @Get()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all customers' })\n  @ApiQuery({ name: 'search', required: false })\n  findAll(@Query('search') search?: string) {\n    return this.customersService.findAll(search);\n  }\n\n  @Get(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get customer by ID with purchase history' })\n  findById(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.customersService.findById(id);\n  }\n\n  @Post()\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Create new customer' })\n  create(@Body() dto: CreateCustomerDto) {\n    return this.customersService.create(dto);\n  }\n\n  @Patch(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Update customer' })\n  update(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateCustomerDto) {\n    return this.customersService.update(id, dto);\n  }\n\n  @Delete(':id')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Delete customer' })\n  delete(@Param('id') id: string) {\n    return this.customersService.delete(id);\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "textEditContent": "import { IsString, IsEmail, IsOptional } from 'class-validator';\nimport { ApiProperty, ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';\n\nexport class CreateCustomerDto {\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'John' })\n  @IsString()\n  firstName: string;\n\n  @ApiProperty({ example: 'Doe' })\n  @IsString()\n  lastName: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: 'john@example.com' })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsEmail()\n  email?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional({ example: '09123456789' })\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  phone?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  company?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  address?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  city?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  state?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  postalCode?: string;\n\n  @ApiPropertyOptional()\n  @IsOptional()\n  @IsString()\n  notes?: string;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
}
```
Additional data:

```json
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/storage/storage.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/storage/storage.service.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';\nimport {\n  S3Client,\n  PutObjectCommand,\n  GetObjectCommand,\n  DeleteObjectCommand,\n} from '@aws-sdk/client-s3';\nimport { getSignedUrl } from '@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class StorageService {\n  private s3Client: S3Client;\n  private bucket: string;\n  private prefix: string;\n\n  constructor(private configService: ConfigService) {\n    this.s3Client = new S3Client({\n      endpoint: this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_ENDPOINT'),\n      region: this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_REGION') || 'us-east-1',\n      credentials: {\n        accessKeyId: this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_ACCESS_KEY') || '',\n        secretAccessKey: this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_SECRET_KEY') || '',\n      },\n      forcePathStyle: true, // Required for Backblaze B2\n    });\n\n    this.bucket = this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_BUCKET') || '';\n    this.prefix = this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_PREFIX') || '';\n  }\n\n  private getFullKey(key: string): string {\n    return &#96;${this.prefix}${key}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  async upload(params: {\n    key: string;\n    body: Buffer;\n    contentType: string;\n  }): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\n    const fullKey = this.getFullKey(params.key);\n\n    await this.s3Client.send(\n      new PutObjectCommand({\n        Bucket: this.bucket,\n        Key: fullKey,\n        Body: params.body,\n        ContentType: params.contentType,\n      }),\n    );\n\n    return this.getPublicUrl(params.key);\n  }\n\n  async getSignedUploadUrl(key: string, contentType: string): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\n    const fullKey = this.getFullKey(key);\n    \n    const command = new PutObjectCommand({\n      Bucket: this.bucket,\n      Key: fullKey,\n      ContentType: contentType,\n    });\n\n    return getSignedUrl(this.s3Client, command, { expiresIn: 3600 });\n  }\n\n  async getSignedDownloadUrl(key: string): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\n    const fullKey = this.getFullKey(key);\n    \n    const command = new GetObjectCommand({\n      Bucket: this.bucket,\n      Key: fullKey,\n    });\n\n    return getSignedUrl(this.s3Client, command, { expiresIn: 3600 });\n  }\n\n  async delete(key: string): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n    const fullKey = this.getFullKey(key);\n\n    await this.s3Client.send(\n      new DeleteObjectCommand({\n        Bucket: this.bucket,\n        Key: fullKey,\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  getPublicUrl(key: string): string {\n    const endpoint = this.configService.get&lt;string&gt;('S3_ENDPOINT') || '';\n    const fullKey = this.getFullKey(key);\n    return &#96;${endpoint}/${this.bucket}/${fullKey}&#96;;\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
}
```
Additional data:

```json
{
  "vscodeToolId": "copilot_createFile",
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/storage/storage.controller.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/modules/storage/storage.controller.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import {\n  Controller,\n  Post,\n  Delete,\n  Body,\n  Param,\n  UseGuards,\n  UseInterceptors,\n  UploadedFile,\n} from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { FileInterceptor } from '@nestjs/platform-express';\nimport { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiBearerAuth, ApiConsumes, ApiBody } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { StorageService } from './storage.service';\nimport { JwtAuthGuard } from '../../common/guards/jwt-auth.guard';\n\n@ApiTags('Storage')\n@ApiBearerAuth()\n@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)\n@Controller('storage')\nexport class StorageController {\n  constructor(private storageService: StorageService) {}\n\n  @Post('upload')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Upload a file' })\n  @ApiConsumes('multipart/form-data')\n  @ApiBody({\n    schema: {\n      type: 'object',\n      properties: {\n        file: { type: 'string', format: 'binary' },\n        folder: { type: 'string', example: 'products' },\n      },\n    },\n  })\n  @UseInterceptors(FileInterceptor('file'))\n  async upload(\n    @UploadedFile() file: Express.Multer.File,\n    @Body('folder') folder: string = 'uploads',\n  ) {\n    const key = &#96;${folder}/${Date.now()}-${file.originalname}&#96;;\n    const url = await this.storageService.upload({\n      key,\n      body: file.buffer,\n      contentType: file.mimetype,\n    });\n\n    return { key, url };\n  }\n\n  @Post('signed-url')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get signed URL for direct upload' })\n  async getSignedUrl(\n    @Body() body: { filename: string; contentType: string; folder?: string },\n  ) {\n    const key = &#96;${body.folder || 'uploads'}/${Date.now()}-${body.filename}&#96;;\n    const signedUrl = await this.storageService.getSignedUploadUrl(\n      key,\n      body.contentType,\n    );\n\n    return { key, signedUrl };\n  }\n\n  @Delete(':key')\n  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Delete a file' })\n  async delete(@Param('key') key: string) {\n    await this.storageService.delete(decodeURIComponent(key));\n    return { message: 'File deleted successfully' };\n  }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/Dockerfile)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/Dockerfile)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# NUCLEUS API - DOCKERFILE\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# Multi-stage build for smaller image size\n\n# Stage 1: Dependencies\nFROM node:20-alpine AS deps\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install pnpm\nRUN corepack enable &amp;&amp; corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate\n\n# Copy workspace files\nCOPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml* ./\nCOPY apps/api/package.json ./apps/api/\nCOPY packages/shared/package.json ./packages/shared/\n\n# Install dependencies\nRUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter @nucleus/api...\n\n# Stage 2: Builder\nFROM node:20-alpine AS builder\nWORKDIR /app\n\nRUN corepack enable &amp;&amp; corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate\n\n# Copy from deps\nCOPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules\nCOPY --from=deps /app/apps/api/node_modules ./apps/api/node_modules\nCOPY --from=deps /app/packages/shared/node_modules ./packages/shared/node_modules\n\n# Copy source code\nCOPY apps/api ./apps/api\nCOPY packages/shared ./packages/shared\nCOPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml ./\n\n# Generate Prisma client\nWORKDIR /app/apps/api\nRUN npx prisma generate\n\n# Build\nRUN pnpm build\n\n# Stage 3: Runner\nFROM node:20-alpine AS runner\nWORKDIR /app\n\nENV NODE_ENV=production\n\n# Create non-root user\nRUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs\nRUN adduser --system --uid 1001 nestjs\n\n# Copy built application\nCOPY --from=builder /app/apps/api/dist ./dist\nCOPY --from=builder /app/apps/api/node_modules ./node_modules\nCOPY --from=builder /app/apps/api/prisma ./prisma\nCOPY --from=builder /app/apps/api/package.json ./\n\nUSER nestjs\n\nEXPOSE 4000\n\n# Run migrations and start server\nCMD [\"sh\", \"-c\", \"npx prisma migrate deploy &amp;&amp; node dist/main\"]\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "textEditContent": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\n\nexport function Providers({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  const [queryClient] = useState(\n    () =&gt;\n      new QueryClient({\n        defaultOptions: {\n          queries: {\n            staleTime: 60 * 1000, // 1 minute\n            refetchOnWindowFocus: false,\n          },\n        },\n      })\n  );\n\n  return (\n    &lt;QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}&gt;{children}&lt;/QueryClientProvider&gt;\n  );\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
}
```
Additional data:

```json
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/src/lib/api.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/src/lib/api.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || \"http://localhost:4000\";\n\ninterface RequestOptions {\n  method?: string;\n  headers?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;;\n  body?: any;\n}\n\nclass ApiClient {\n  private baseUrl: string;\n  private token: string | null = null;\n\n  constructor(baseUrl: string) {\n    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;\n  }\n\n  setToken(token: string | null) {\n    this.token = token;\n  }\n\n  private async request&lt;T&gt;(endpoint: string, options: RequestOptions = {}): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\n    const headers: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...options.headers,\n    };\n\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers[\"Authorization\"] = &#96;Bearer ${this.token}&#96;;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(&#96;${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}&#96;, {\n      method: options.method || \"GET\",\n      headers,\n      body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() =&gt; ({ message: \"Request failed\" }));\n      throw new Error(error.message || &#96;HTTP ${response.status}&#96;);\n    }\n\n    return response.json();\n  }\n\n  // Auth\n  login(email: string, password: string) {\n    return this.request&lt;{ accessToken: string; refreshToken: string; user: any }&gt;(\"/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email, password },\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Products\n  getProducts(params?: { search?: string; categoryId?: string }) {\n    const query = new URLSearchParams(params as any).toString();\n    return this.request&lt;any[]&gt;(&#96;/products${query ? &#96;?${query}&#96; : \"\"}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  getProduct(id: string) {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(&#96;/products/${id}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  getProductByBarcode(barcode: string) {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(&#96;/products/barcode/${barcode}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  // Sales\n  getSales() {\n    return this.request&lt;any[]&gt;(\"/sales\");\n  }\n\n  getSalesToday() {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(\"/sales/today\");\n  }\n\n  createSale(data: any) {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(\"/sales\", { method: \"POST\", body: data });\n  }\n\n  // Inventory\n  getInventorySummary() {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(\"/inventory/summary\");\n  }\n\n  getLowStockProducts() {\n    return this.request&lt;any[]&gt;(\"/inventory/low-stock\");\n  }\n\n  // Customers\n  getCustomers(search?: string) {\n    const query = search ? &#96;?search=${encodeURIComponent(search)}&#96; : \"\";\n    return this.request&lt;any[]&gt;(&#96;/customers${query}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  getCustomer(id: string) {\n    return this.request&lt;any&gt;(&#96;/customers/${id}&#96;);\n  }\n}\n\nexport const api = new ApiClient(API_URL);\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/Dockerfile)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/Dockerfile)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n# NUCLEUS WEB - DOCKERFILE\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n# Stage 1: Dependencies\nFROM node:20-alpine AS deps\nWORKDIR /app\n\nRUN corepack enable &amp;&amp; corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate\n\nCOPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml* ./\nCOPY apps/web/package.json ./apps/web/\nCOPY packages/shared/package.json ./packages/shared/\nCOPY packages/ui/package.json ./packages/ui/\n\nRUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter @nucleus/web...\n\n# Stage 2: Builder\nFROM node:20-alpine AS builder\nWORKDIR /app\n\nRUN corepack enable &amp;&amp; corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate\n\nCOPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules\nCOPY --from=deps /app/apps/web/node_modules ./apps/web/node_modules\nCOPY --from=deps /app/packages ./packages\n\nCOPY apps/web ./apps/web\nCOPY packages ./packages\nCOPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml ./\n\n# Build arguments for environment\nARG API_URL\nARG WS_URL\n\nENV API_URL=$API_URL\nENV WS_URL=$WS_URL\nENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1\n\nWORKDIR /app/apps/web\nRUN pnpm build\n\n# Stage 3: Runner\nFROM node:20-alpine AS runner\nWORKDIR /app\n\nENV NODE_ENV=production\nENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1\n\nRUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs\nRUN adduser --system --uid 1001 nextjs\n\nCOPY --from=builder /app/apps/web/public ./public\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/apps/web/.next/standalone ./\nCOPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/apps/web/.next/static ./.next/static\n\nUSER nextjs\n\nEXPOSE 3000\n\nENV PORT=3000\nENV HOSTNAME=\"0.0.0.0\"\n\nCMD [\"node\", \"server.js\"]\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "file_path": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\apps\\pos\\src\\App.tsx",
  "relativeWorkspacePath": "\\home\\me\\UbuntuDevFiles\\1_COMPANY_DEV\\CompanyApps\\Nucleus-Business-Suite\\apps\\pos\\src\\App.tsx"
}
```
Additional data:

```json
{
  "vscodeToolId": "copilot_createFile",
  "isHidden": false
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src/App.tsx)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src/App.tsx)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { invoke } from \"@tauri-apps/api/core\";\n\ninterface CartItem {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  price: number;\n  quantity: number;\n}\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState&lt;CartItem[]&gt;([]);\n  const [barcode, setBarcode] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const addToCart = async () =&gt; {\n    if (!barcode) return;\n\n    // TODO: Fetch product by barcode from API\n    const mockProduct = {\n      id: barcode,\n      name: &#96;Product ${barcode}&#96;,\n      price: 99.99,\n      quantity: 1,\n    };\n\n    setCart((prev) =&gt; {\n      const existing = prev.find((item) =&gt; item.id === mockProduct.id);\n      if (existing) {\n        return prev.map((item) =&gt;\n          item.id === mockProduct.id\n            ? { ...item, quantity: item.quantity + 1 }\n            : item\n        );\n      }\n      return [...prev, mockProduct];\n    });\n\n    setBarcode(\"\");\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (id: string) =&gt; {\n    setCart((prev) =&gt; prev.filter((item) =&gt; item.id !== id));\n  };\n\n  const total = cart.reduce((sum, item) =&gt; sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0);\n\n  const handlePrint = async () =&gt; {\n    try {\n      await invoke(\"print_receipt\", {\n        receipt: {\n          items: cart,\n          total,\n          date: new Date().toISOString(),\n        },\n      });\n      alert(\"Receipt printed!\");\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Print error:\", error);\n      alert(\"Print not available in browser mode\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCheckout = () =&gt; {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    alert(&#96;Checkout: ₱${total.toFixed(2)}&#96;);\n    setCart([]);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 flex\"&gt;\n      {/* Left Panel - Product Search */}\n      &lt;div className=\"flex-1 p-4\"&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-4 mb-4\"&gt;\n          &lt;h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-4\"&gt;Nucleus POS&lt;/h2&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex gap-2\"&gt;\n            &lt;input\n              type=\"text\"\n              value={barcode}\n              onChange={(e) =&gt; setBarcode(e.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(e) =&gt; e.key === \"Enter\" &amp;&amp; addToCart()}\n              placeholder=\"Scan barcode or enter SKU...\"\n              className=\"flex-1 px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500\"\n              autoFocus\n            /&gt;\n            &lt;button\n              onClick={addToCart}\n              className=\"px-6 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700\"\n            &gt;\n              Add\n            &lt;/button&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n\n        {/* Quick Product Grid - Placeholder */}\n        &lt;div className=\"bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-4\"&gt;\n          &lt;h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-3\"&gt;Quick Access&lt;/h3&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-2\"&gt;\n            {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8].map((i) =&gt; (\n              &lt;button\n                key={i}\n                className=\"p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 text-center\"\n                onClick={() =&gt; setBarcode(&#96;PROD-${i}&#96;)}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"text-2xl mb-1\"&gt;📦&lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"text-sm\"&gt;Product {i}&lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;/button&gt;\n            ))}\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n\n      {/* Right Panel - Cart */}\n      &lt;div className=\"w-96 bg-white shadow-lg flex flex-col\"&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"p-4 border-b\"&gt;\n          &lt;h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold\"&gt;Current Sale&lt;/h2&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n\n        &lt;div className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto p-4\"&gt;\n          {cart.length === 0 ? (\n            &lt;p className=\"text-gray-500 text-center py-8\"&gt;\n              Cart is empty. Scan a product to begin.\n            &lt;/p&gt;\n          ) : (\n            &lt;div className=\"space-y-2\"&gt;\n              {cart.map((item) =&gt; (\n                &lt;div\n                  key={item.id}\n                  className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg\"\n                &gt;\n                  &lt;div&gt;\n                    &lt;div className=\"font-medium\"&gt;{item.name}&lt;/div&gt;\n                    &lt;div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\"&gt;\n                      ₱{item.price.toFixed(2)} × {item.quantity}\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n                    &lt;span className=\"font-semibold\"&gt;\n                      ₱{(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}\n                    &lt;/span&gt;\n                    &lt;button\n                      onClick={() =&gt; removeFromCart(item.id)}\n                      className=\"text-red-500 hover:text-red-700\"\n                    &gt;\n                      ✕\n                    &lt;/button&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              ))}\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n\n        &lt;div className=\"p-4 border-t bg-gray-50\"&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex justify-between text-2xl font-bold mb-4\"&gt;\n            &lt;span&gt;Total:&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;span&gt;₱{total.toFixed(2)}&lt;/span&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2\"&gt;\n            &lt;button\n              onClick={handlePrint}\n              className=\"px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100\"\n            &gt;\n              🖨️ Print\n            &lt;/button&gt;\n            &lt;button\n              onClick={handleCheckout}\n              disabled={cart.length === 0}\n              className=\"px-4 py-3 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-green-700 disabled:opacity-50\"\n            &gt;\n              💳 Checkout\n            &lt;/button&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/main.rs)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/main.rs)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Nucleus POS - Tauri Application\n// Hardware integration and offline storage\n\n#![cfg_attr(not(debug_assertions), windows_subsystem = \"windows\")]\n\nmod commands;\nmod hardware;\nmod offline;\n\nuse commands::{print_receipt, open_cash_drawer, scan_barcode};\n\nfn main() {\n    tauri::Builder::default()\n        .plugin(tauri_plugin_shell::init())\n        .invoke_handler(tauri::generate_handler![\n            print_receipt,\n            open_cash_drawer,\n            scan_barcode,\n            commands::get_printer_status,\n            commands::sync_offline_sales,\n        ])\n        .setup(|_app| {\n            // Initialize offline database\n            if let Err(e) = offline::init_database() {\n                eprintln!(\"Failed to initialize offline database: {}\", e);\n            }\n            Ok(())\n        })\n        .run(tauri::generate_context!())\n        .expect(\"error while running tauri application\");\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs)",

  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Tauri Commands - Bridge between frontend and hardware/system\n\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\n\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct ReceiptItem {\n    pub id: String,\n    pub name: String,\n    pub price: f64,\n    pub quantity: i32,\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct Receipt {\n    pub items: Vec&lt;ReceiptItem&gt;,\n    pub total: f64,\n    pub date: String,\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\npub struct PrinterStatus {\n    pub connected: bool,\n    pub paper_low: bool,\n    pub error: Option&lt;String&gt;,\n}\n\n/// Print a receipt to the thermal printer\n#[tauri::command]\npub async fn print_receipt(receipt: Receipt) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n    println!(\"Printing receipt with {} items\", receipt.items.len());\n    println!(\"Total: {:.2}\", receipt.total);\n    \n    // TODO: Implement actual printing using escpos-rs or similar\n    // For now, just log the receipt\n    for item in &amp;receipt.items {\n        println!(\"  {} x {} @ {:.2}\", item.quantity, item.name, item.price);\n    }\n    \n    // Simulate print delay\n    tokio::time::sleep(tokio::time::Duration::from_millis(500)).await;\n    \n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Open the cash drawer\n#[tauri::command]\npub async fn open_cash_drawer() -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n    println!(\"Opening cash drawer...\");\n    \n    // TODO: Send ESC/POS command to open drawer\n    // Typical command: ESC p 0 25 250\n    \n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Scan barcode (for USB HID scanners that don't work as keyboard)\n#[tauri::command]\npub async fn scan_barcode() -&gt; Result&lt;String, String&gt; {\n    // TODO: Implement USB HID barcode scanner reading\n    // Most scanners work as keyboard input, so this is only needed for special cases\n    \n    Err(\"Scanner not implemented - use keyboard mode\".to_string())\n}\n\n/// Get printer status\n#[tauri::command]\npub async fn get_printer_status() -&gt; Result&lt;PrinterStatus, String&gt; {\n    // TODO: Query actual printer status\n    \n    Ok(PrinterStatus {\n        connected: false,\n        paper_low: false,\n        error: Some(\"Printer not configured\".to_string()),\n    })\n}\n\n/// Sync offline sales to the server\n#[tauri::command]\npub async fn sync_offline_sales() -&gt; Result&lt;i32, String&gt; {\n    // TODO: Read pending sales from SQLite and sync to API\n    \n    let synced_count = 0;\n    println!(\"Synced {} offline sales\", synced_count);\n    \n    Ok(synced_count)\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/hardware/printer.rs)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/hardware/printer.rs)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Thermal Printer Interface\n// Supports ESC/POS compatible printers via USB or Network\n\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub enum PrinterConnection {\n    Usb { vendor_id: u16, product_id: u16 },\n    Network { ip: String, port: u16 },\n    Serial { port: String, baud_rate: u32 },\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ThermalPrinter {\n    connection: PrinterConnection,\n}\n\nimpl ThermalPrinter {\n    pub fn new(connection: PrinterConnection) -&gt; Self {\n        Self { connection }\n    }\n\n    /// Print text with ESC/POS commands\n    pub fn print_text(&amp;self, text: &amp;str) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        // TODO: Implement actual printing\n        println!(\"[PRINTER] {}\", text);\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Print a line separator\n    pub fn print_separator(&amp;self) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        self.print_text(\"--------------------------------\")\n    }\n\n    /// Cut paper (full or partial)\n    pub fn cut_paper(&amp;self, full_cut: bool) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        if full_cut {\n            println!(\"[PRINTER] Full cut\");\n        } else {\n            println!(\"[PRINTER] Partial cut\");\n        }\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Open cash drawer\n    pub fn open_drawer(&amp;self) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        println!(\"[PRINTER] Opening cash drawer\");\n        // ESC p 0 25 250\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Set text alignment\n    pub fn set_alignment(&amp;self, align: TextAlign) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        println!(\"[PRINTER] Set alignment: {:?}\", align);\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    /// Set text size\n    pub fn set_text_size(&amp;self, width: u8, height: u8) -&gt; Result&lt;(), String&gt; {\n        println!(\"[PRINTER] Set text size: {}x{}\", width, height);\n        Ok(())\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]\npub enum TextAlign {\n    Left,\n    Center,\n    Right,\n}\n\n/// Format a receipt for printing\npub fn format_receipt(\n    company_name: &amp;str,\n    items: &amp;[(String, i32, f64)], // (name, qty, price)\n    subtotal: f64,\n    tax: f64,\n    total: f64,\n    receipt_no: &amp;str,\n) -&gt; String {\n    let mut output = String::new();\n    \n    // Header\n    output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"{:^32}\\n\", company_name));\n    output.push_str(\"================================\\n\");\n    output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"Receipt: {}\\n\", receipt_no));\n    output.push_str(\"--------------------------------\\n\");\n    \n    // Items\n    for (name, qty, price) in items {\n        let line_total = (*qty as f64) * price;\n        output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"{}\\n\", name));\n        output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"  {} x {:.2} = {:.2}\\n\", qty, price, line_total));\n    }\n    \n    output.push_str(\"--------------------------------\\n\");\n    output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"Subtotal:          {:&gt;10.2}\\n\", subtotal));\n    output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"Tax (12%):         {:&gt;10.2}\\n\", tax));\n    output.push_str(\"================================\\n\");\n    output.push_str(&amp;format!(\"TOTAL:             {:&gt;10.2}\\n\", total));\n    output.push_str(\"================================\\n\\n\");\n    output.push_str(\"       Thank you for your\\n\");\n    output.push_str(\"          purchase!\\n\\n\");\n    \n    output\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/offline/mod.rs)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/pos/src-tauri/src/offline/mod.rs)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Offline Storage Module\n// SQLite database for offline-first POS functionality\n\nuse rusqlite::{Connection, Result};\nuse std::path::PathBuf;\n\n/// Get the path to the offline database\nfn get_db_path() -&gt; PathBuf {\n    // Use app data directory in production\n    let mut path = dirs::data_local_dir().unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n    path.push(\"nucleus-pos\");\n    std::fs::create_dir_all(&amp;path).ok();\n    path.push(\"offline.db\");\n    path\n}\n\n/// Initialize the offline database with required tables\npub fn init_database() -&gt; Result&lt;()&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n\n    // Pending sales (to be synced)\n    conn.execute(\n        \"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_sales (\n            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n            data TEXT NOT NULL,\n            created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n            synced INTEGER DEFAULT 0\n        )\",\n        [],\n    )?;\n\n    // Products cache\n    conn.execute(\n        \"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS products_cache (\n            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n            barcode TEXT,\n            name TEXT NOT NULL,\n            price REAL NOT NULL,\n            stock INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\n        )\",\n        [],\n    )?;\n\n    // Create index on barcode for fast lookups\n    conn.execute(\n        \"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_products_barcode ON products_cache(barcode)\",\n        [],\n    )?;\n\n    // Customers cache\n    conn.execute(\n        \"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS customers_cache (\n            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n            name TEXT NOT NULL,\n            phone TEXT,\n            email TEXT,\n            loyalty_points INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\n        )\",\n        [],\n    )?;\n\n    println!(\"Offline database initialized at {:?}\", get_db_path());\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Save a sale for later syncing\npub fn save_pending_sale(id: &amp;str, data: &amp;str) -&gt; Result&lt;()&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n    conn.execute(\n        \"INSERT INTO pending_sales (id, data, created_at) VALUES (?1, ?2, datetime('now'))\",\n        [id, data],\n    )?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Get all pending sales that need to be synced\npub fn get_pending_sales() -&gt; Result&lt;Vec&lt;(String, String)&gt;&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n    let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\"SELECT id, data FROM pending_sales WHERE synced = 0\")?;\n    let rows = stmt.query_map([], |row| Ok((row.get(0)?, row.get(1)?)))?;\n    \n    let mut sales = Vec::new();\n    for row in rows {\n        sales.push(row?);\n    }\n    Ok(sales)\n}\n\n/// Mark a sale as synced\npub fn mark_sale_synced(id: &amp;str) -&gt; Result&lt;()&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n    conn.execute(\"UPDATE pending_sales SET synced = 1 WHERE id = ?1\", [id])?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Cache a product for offline lookup\npub fn cache_product(id: &amp;str, barcode: Option&lt;&amp;str&gt;, name: &amp;str, price: f64, stock: i32) -&gt; Result&lt;()&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n    conn.execute(\n        \"INSERT OR REPLACE INTO products_cache (id, barcode, name, price, stock, updated_at) \n         VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, datetime('now'))\",\n        rusqlite::params![id, barcode, name, price, stock],\n    )?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\n/// Get a product from cache by barcode\npub fn get_cached_product_by_barcode(barcode: &amp;str) -&gt; Result&lt;Option&lt;(String, String, f64, i32)&gt;&gt; {\n    let conn = Connection::open(get_db_path())?;\n    let mut stmt = conn.prepare(\n        \"SELECT id, name, price, stock FROM products_cache WHERE barcode = ?1\"\n    )?;\n    \n    let mut rows = stmt.query([barcode])?;\n    if let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n        Ok(Some((row.get(0)?, row.get(1)?, row.get(2)?, row.get(3)?)))\n    } else {\n        Ok(None)\n    }\n}\n\n// Add dirs crate for cross-platform paths\nfn dirs_stub() {\n    // This is a placeholder - in real code, add &#96;dirs = \"5\"&#96; to Cargo.toml\n}\n\nmod dirs {\n    use std::path::PathBuf;\n    \n    pub fn data_local_dir() -&gt; Option&lt;PathBuf&gt; {\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"linux\")]\n        {\n            std::env::var(\"HOME\").ok().map(|h| PathBuf::from(h).join(\".local/share\"))\n        }\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"windows\")]\n        {\n            std::env::var(\"LOCALAPPDATA\").ok().map(PathBuf::from)\n        }\n        #[cfg(target_os = \"macos\")]\n        {\n            std::env::var(\"HOME\").ok().map(|h| PathBuf::from(h).join(\"Library/Application Support\"))\n        }\n        #[cfg(not(any(target_os = \"linux\", target_os = \"windows\", target_os = \"macos\")))]\n        {\n            None\n        }\n    }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "textEditContent": "// Common types used across the application\n\nexport interface PaginatedResponse&lt;T&gt; {\n  data: T[];\n  meta: {\n    total: number;\n    page: number;\n    pageSize: number;\n    totalPages: number;\n  };\n}\n\nexport interface ApiResponse&lt;T&gt; {\n  success: boolean;\n  data?: T;\n  error?: {\n    code: string;\n    message: string;\n  };\n}\n\nexport interface SortOptions {\n  field: string;\n  order: 'asc' | 'desc';\n}\n\nexport interface FilterOptions {\n  field: string;\n  operator: 'eq' | 'ne' | 'gt' | 'lt' | 'gte' | 'lte' | 'contains' | 'startsWith';\n  value: string | number | boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface QueryOptions {\n  page?: number;\n  pageSize?: number;\n  sort?: SortOptions;\n  filters?: FilterOptions[];\n  search?: string;\n}\n\nexport type PaymentMethod = 'CASH' | 'CARD' | 'TRANSFER' | 'CREDIT';\nexport type OrderStatus = 'PENDING' | 'PROCESSING' | 'SHIPPED' | 'DELIVERED' | 'CANCELLED';\nexport type SaleStatus = 'PENDING' | 'COMPLETED' | 'REFUNDED' | 'VOID';\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "textEditContent": "// Product and inventory types\n\nexport interface Category {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  description?: string;\n  parentId?: string;\n  createdAt: Date;\n  updatedAt: Date;\n}\n\nexport interface Product {\n  id: string;\n  sku: string;\n  barcode?: string;\n  name: string;\n  description?: string;\n  price: number;\n  cost?: number;\n  stock: number;\n  minStock: number;\n  categoryId?: string;\n  category?: Category;\n  imageUrl?: string;\n  active: boolean;\n  createdAt: Date;\n  updatedAt: Date;\n}\n\nexport interface CreateProductInput {\n  sku: string;\n  barcode?: string;\n  name: string;\n  description?: string;\n  price: number;\n  cost?: number;\n  stock?: number;\n  minStock?: number;\n  categoryId?: string;\n  imageUrl?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface UpdateProductInput {\n  sku?: string;\n  barcode?: string;\n  name?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  price?: number;\n  cost?: number;\n  stock?: number;\n  minStock?: number;\n  categoryId?: string;\n  imageUrl?: string;\n  active?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface StockMovement {\n  id: string;\n  productId: string;\n  quantity: number;\n  type: 'IN' | 'OUT' | 'ADJUSTMENT';\n  reason?: string;\n  reference?: string;\n  createdAt: Date;\n}\n\nexport interface LowStockAlert {\n  product: Product;\n  currentStock: number;\n  minStock: number;\n  deficit: number;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Sale and transaction types\n\nimport { PaymentMethod, SaleStatus } from './common';\nimport { Product } from './product';\nimport { Customer } from './customer';\n\nexport interface SaleItem {\n  id: string;\n  saleId: string;\n  productId: string;\n  product?: Product;\n  quantity: number;\n  unitPrice: number;\n  discount: number;\n  total: number;\n}\n\nexport interface Sale {\n  id: string;\n  receiptNumber: string;\n  customerId?: string;\n  customer?: Customer;\n  items: SaleItem[];\n  subtotal: number;\n  tax: number;\n  discount: number;\n  total: number;\n  paymentMethod: PaymentMethod;\n  status: SaleStatus;\n  cashierId: string;\n  notes?: string;\n  createdAt: Date;\n  updatedAt: Date;\n}\n\nexport interface CreateSaleInput {\n  customerId?: string;\n  items: CreateSaleItemInput[];\n  paymentMethod: PaymentMethod;\n  discount?: number;\n  notes?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface CreateSaleItemInput {\n  productId: string;\n  quantity: number;\n  unitPrice: number;\n  discount?: number;\n}\n\nexport interface DailySalesReport {\n  date: string;\n  totalSales: number;\n  totalTransactions: number;\n  averageTransaction: number;\n  byPaymentMethod: Record&lt;PaymentMethod, number&gt;;\n  topProducts: Array&lt;{\n    product: Product;\n    quantity: number;\n    revenue: number;\n  }&gt;;\n}\n\nexport interface Receipt {\n  sale: Sale;\n  companyName: string;\n  companyAddress?: string;\n  companyPhone?: string;\n  footer?: string;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/shared/src/utils/format.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/shared/src/utils/format.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Formatting utilities\n\n/**\n * Format a number as currency\n */\nexport function formatCurrency(\n  amount: number,\n  currency: string = 'USD',\n  locale: string = 'en-US'\n): string {\n  return new Intl.NumberFormat(locale, {\n    style: 'currency',\n    currency,\n  }).format(amount);\n}\n\n/**\n * Format a date\n */\nexport function formatDate(\n  date: Date | string,\n  locale: string = 'en-US',\n  options?: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions\n): string {\n  const d = typeof date === 'string' ? new Date(date) : date;\n  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(locale, options ?? {\n    year: 'numeric',\n    month: 'short',\n    day: 'numeric',\n  }).format(d);\n}\n\n/**\n * Format a date with time\n */\nexport function formatDateTime(\n  date: Date | string,\n  locale: string = 'en-US'\n): string {\n  return formatDate(date, locale, {\n    year: 'numeric',\n    month: 'short',\n    day: 'numeric',\n    hour: '2-digit',\n    minute: '2-digit',\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a receipt number\n */\nexport function generateReceiptNumber(prefix: string = 'RCP'): string {\n  const date = new Date();\n  const year = date.getFullYear().toString().slice(-2);\n  const month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0');\n  const day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0');\n  const random = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase();\n  return &#96;${prefix}-${year}${month}${day}-${random}&#96;;\n}\n\n/**\n * Format a phone number\n */\nexport function formatPhone(phone: string): string {\n  const cleaned = phone.replace(/\\D/g, '');\n  if (cleaned.length === 10) {\n    return &#96;(${cleaned.slice(0, 3)}) ${cleaned.slice(3, 6)}-${cleaned.slice(6)}&#96;;\n  }\n  if (cleaned.length === 11 &amp;&amp; cleaned.startsWith('1')) {\n    return &#96;+1 (${cleaned.slice(1, 4)}) ${cleaned.slice(4, 7)}-${cleaned.slice(7)}&#96;;\n  }\n  return phone;\n}\n\n/**\n * Truncate text with ellipsis\n */\nexport function truncate(text: string, maxLength: number): string {\n  if (text.length &lt;= maxLength) return text;\n  return text.slice(0, maxLength - 3) + '...';\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a slug from a string\n */\nexport function slugify(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .toLowerCase()\n    .trim()\n    .replace(/[^\\w\\s-]/g, '')\n    .replace(/[\\s_-]+/g, '-')\n    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
}
```

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/shared/src/utils/validation.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/shared/src/utils/validation.ts)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "// Validation utilities using Zod\n\nimport { z } from 'zod';\n\n// Email validation\nexport const emailSchema = z.string().email('Invalid email address');\n\n// Password validation (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number)\nexport const passwordSchema = z\n  .string()\n  .min(8, 'Password must be at least 8 characters')\n  .regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter')\n  .regex(/[a-z]/, 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter')\n  .regex(/[0-9]/, 'Password must contain at least one number');\n\n// Phone validation (basic)\nexport const phoneSchema = z\n  .string()\n  .regex(/^[+]?[(]?[0-9]{1,3}[)]?[-\\s.]?[(]?[0-9]{1,4}[)]?[-\\s.]?[0-9]{1,4}[-\\s.]?[0-9]{1,9}$/, 'Invalid phone number')\n  .optional();\n\n// Price validation (positive number with 2 decimal places)\nexport const priceSchema = z\n  .number()\n  .positive('Price must be positive')\n  .multipleOf(0.01, 'Price can have at most 2 decimal places');\n\n// Quantity validation (positive integer)\nexport const quantitySchema = z\n  .number()\n  .int('Quantity must be a whole number')\n  .positive('Quantity must be positive');\n\n// SKU validation\nexport const skuSchema = z\n  .string()\n  .min(3, 'SKU must be at least 3 characters')\n  .max(50, 'SKU must be at most 50 characters')\n  .regex(/^[A-Za-z0-9-_]+$/, 'SKU can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores');\n\n// Barcode validation (EAN-13, UPC-A, etc.)\nexport const barcodeSchema = z\n  .string()\n  .regex(/^[0-9]{8,14}$/, 'Invalid barcode format')\n  .optional();\n\n// Product schema\nexport const productSchema = z.object({\n  sku: skuSchema,\n  barcode: barcodeSchema,\n  name: z.string().min(1, 'Name is required').max(200),\n  description: z.string().max(2000).optional(),\n  price: priceSchema,\n  cost: priceSchema.optional(),\n  stock: z.number().int().min(0).default(0),\n  minStock: z.number().int().min(0).default(0),\n  categoryId: z.string().cuid().optional(),\n});\n\n// Sale item schema\nexport const saleItemSchema = z.object({\n  productId: z.string().cuid('Invalid product ID'),\n  quantity: quantitySchema,\n  unitPrice: priceSchema,\n  discount: z.number().min(0).max(100).default(0),\n});\n\n// Sale schema\nexport const saleSchema = z.object({\n  customerId: z.string().cuid().optional(),\n  items: z.array(saleItemSchema).min(1, 'At least one item is required'),\n  paymentMethod: z.enum(['CASH', 'CARD', 'TRANSFER', 'CREDIT']),\n  discount: z.number().min(0).default(0),\n  notes: z.string().max(500).optional(),\n});\n\n// Customer schema\nexport const customerSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1, 'Name is required').max(200),\n  email: emailSchema.optional(),\n  phone: phoneSchema,\n  address: z.string().max(500).optional(),\n  city: z.string().max(100).optional(),\n  country: z.string().max(100).optional(),\n  notes: z.string().max(1000).optional(),\n});\n\n// Helper to validate and return typed result\nexport function validate&lt;T&gt;(schema: z.ZodSchema&lt;T&gt;, data: unknown): { success: true; data: T } | { success: false; errors: z.ZodError } {\n  const result = schema.safeParse(data);\n  if (result.success) {\n    return { success: true, data: result.data };\n  }\n  return { success: false, errors: result.error };\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "textEditContent": "// Utility functions\n\nimport { clsx, type ClassValue } from 'clsx';\nimport { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';\n\n/**\n * Merge Tailwind CSS classes with clsx\n */\nexport function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {\n  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
{
```
```json
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/ui/src/components/Button.tsx)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/packages/ui/src/components/Button.tsx)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
```
```json
  "textEditContent": "import React from 'react';\nimport { cn } from '../utils';\n\nexport interface ButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLButtonElement&gt; {\n  variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'danger' | 'ghost';\n  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';\n  loading?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const Button = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, variant = 'primary', size = 'md', loading, disabled, children, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {\n    const baseStyles = 'inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed';\n    \n    const variants = {\n      primary: 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 focus:ring-blue-500',\n      secondary: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-200 focus:ring-gray-500',\n      danger: 'bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 focus:ring-red-500',\n      ghost: 'bg-transparent text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 focus:ring-gray-500',\n    };\n\n    const sizes = {\n      sm: 'px-3 py-1.5 text-sm',\n      md: 'px-4 py-2 text-base',\n      lg: 'px-6 py-3 text-lg',\n    };\n\n    return (\n      &lt;button\n        ref={ref}\n        className={cn(baseStyles, variants[variant], sizes[size], className)}\n        disabled={disabled || loading}\n        {...props}\n      &gt;\n        {loading &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;svg className=\"animate-spin -ml-1 mr-2 h-4 w-4\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"&gt;\n            &lt;circle className=\"opacity-25\" cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"4\" /&gt;\n            &lt;path className=\"opacity-75\" fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z\" /&gt;\n          &lt;/svg&gt;\n        )}\n        {children}\n      &lt;/button&gt;\n    );\n  }\n);\n\nButton.displayName = 'Button';\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

</tool-use>

```json
  "textEditContent": "import React from 'react';\nimport { cn } from '../utils';\n\nexport interface InputProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt; {\n  label?: string;\n  error?: string;\n  leftIcon?: React.ReactNode;\n  rightIcon?: React.ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport const Input = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLInputElement, InputProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, label, error, leftIcon, rightIcon, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"w-full\"&gt;\n        {label &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;label className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\"&gt;\n            {label}\n          &lt;/label&gt;\n        )}\n        &lt;div className=\"relative\"&gt;\n          {leftIcon &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;div className=\"absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-gray-400\"&gt;\n              {leftIcon}\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          )}\n          &lt;input\n            ref={ref}\n            className={cn(\n              'block w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-300 px-4 py-2 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400',\n              'focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none',\n              'disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed',\n              error &amp;&amp; 'border-red-500 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-500',\n              leftIcon &amp;&amp; 'pl-10',\n              rightIcon &amp;&amp; 'pr-10',\n              className\n            )}\n            {...props}\n          /&gt;\n          {rightIcon &amp;&amp; (\n            &lt;div className=\"absolute inset-y-0 right-0 pr-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-gray-400\"&gt;\n              {rightIcon}\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          )}\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n        {error &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-red-600\"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n);\n\nInput.displayName = 'Input';\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

```json
  "textEditContent": "import React from 'react';\nimport { cn } from '../utils';\n\nexport interface CardProps extends React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt; {\n  padding?: 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';\n}\n\nexport const Card = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLDivElement, CardProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, padding = 'md', children, ...props }, ref) =&gt; {\n    const paddings = {\n      none: '',\n      sm: 'p-3',\n      md: 'p-4',\n      lg: 'p-6',\n    };\n\n    return (\n      &lt;div\n        ref={ref}\n        className={cn(\n          'bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm',\n          paddings[padding],\n          className\n        )}\n        {...props}\n      &gt;\n        {children}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n);\n\nCard.displayName = 'Card';\n\nexport interface CardHeaderProps extends React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt; {}\n\nexport const CardHeader = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLDivElement, CardHeaderProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (\n    &lt;div ref={ref} className={cn('px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200', className)} {...props} /&gt;\n  )\n);\n\nCardHeader.displayName = 'CardHeader';\n\nexport interface CardTitleProps extends React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLHeadingElement&gt; {}\n\nexport const CardTitle = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLHeadingElement, CardTitleProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (\n    &lt;h3 ref={ref} className={cn('text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900', className)} {...props} /&gt;\n  )\n);\n\nCardTitle.displayName = 'CardTitle';\n\nexport interface CardContentProps extends React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt; {}\n\nexport const CardContent = React.forwardRef&lt;HTMLDivElement, CardContentProps&gt;(\n  ({ className, ...props }, ref) =&gt; (\n    &lt;div ref={ref} className={cn('p-4', className)} {...props} /&gt;\n  )\n);\n\nCardContent.displayName = 'CardContent';\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/scripts/setup.sh)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/scripts/setup.sh)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "#!/bin/bash\n\n# Nucleus Business Suite - Setup Script\n# This script sets up the development environment\n\nset -e\n\necho \"🚀 Setting up Nucleus Business Suite...\"\n\n# Check prerequisites\ncheck_command() {\n    if ! command -v $1 &amp;&gt; /dev/null; then\n        echo \"❌ $1 is required but not installed.\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n    echo \"✅ $1 is installed\"\n}\n\necho \"\"\necho \"Checking prerequisites...\"\ncheck_command node\ncheck_command pnpm\ncheck_command docker\n\n# Check Node.js version\nNODE_VERSION=$(node -v | cut -d'v' -f2 | cut -d'.' -f1)\nif [ \"$NODE_VERSION\" -lt 18 ]; then\n    echo \"❌ Node.js 18+ is required. Current version: $(node -v)\"\n    exit 1\nfi\necho \"✅ Node.js version: $(node -v)\"\n\n# Install dependencies\necho \"\"\necho \"📦 Installing dependencies...\"\npnpm install\n\n# Setup environment files\necho \"\"\necho \"🔧 Setting up environment files...\"\n\nif [ ! -f .env ]; then\n    cp .env.example .env\n    echo \"✅ Created .env from .env.example\"\nelse\n    echo \"⚠️  .env already exists, skipping...\"\nfi\n\nif [ ! -f apps/api/.env ]; then\n    cp .env.example apps/api/.env\n    echo \"✅ Created apps/api/.env\"\nfi\n\nif [ ! -f apps/web/.env.local ]; then\n    echo \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001\" &gt; apps/web/.env.local\n    echo \"✅ Created apps/web/.env.local\"\nfi\n\n# Start Docker containers\necho \"\"\necho \"🐳 Starting Docker containers...\"\ndocker compose --profile local up -d\n\n# Wait for PostgreSQL to be ready\necho \"\"\necho \"⏳ Waiting for PostgreSQL to be ready...\"\nsleep 5\n\n# Generate Prisma client and push schema\necho \"\"\necho \"🗄️  Setting up database...\"\ncd apps/api\npnpm prisma generate\npnpm prisma db push\ncd ../..\n\necho \"\"\necho \"✅ Setup complete!\"\necho \"\"\necho \"Next steps:\"\necho \"  1. Start development: pnpm dev\"\necho \"  2. Open dashboard: http://localhost:3000\"\necho \"  3. API docs: http://localhost:3001/api/docs\"\necho \"\"\necho \"For POS development:\"\necho \"  cd apps/pos &amp;&amp; pnpm tauri dev\"\necho \"\"\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

```json
  "textEditContent": "#!/bin/bash\n\n# Nucleus Business Suite - Reset Development Environment\n# WARNING: This will delete all local data!\n\nset -e\n\necho \"⚠️  This will reset your development environment and DELETE ALL LOCAL DATA!\"\nread -p \"Are you sure? (y/N) \" -n 1 -r\necho\n\nif [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then\n    echo \"Cancelled.\"\n    exit 0\nfi\n\necho \"\"\necho \"🛑 Stopping containers...\"\ndocker compose --profile local down -v\n\necho \"\"\necho \"🗑️  Cleaning up...\"\nrm -rf node_modules\nrm -rf apps/api/node_modules\nrm -rf apps/web/node_modules\nrm -rf apps/pos/node_modules\nrm -rf packages/shared/node_modules\nrm -rf packages/ui/node_modules\n\n# Remove generated files\nrm -rf apps/api/prisma/migrations\nrm -rf apps/web/.next\nrm -rf apps/pos/dist\nrm -rf apps/pos/src-tauri/target\n\necho \"\"\necho \"🚀 Running setup...\"\n./scripts/setup.sh\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

The user wants me to scaffold the Nucleus Business Suite project with the architecture we discussed. Let me create the project structure with all the necessary files.

I'll need to create:
1. Root configuration files (package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, etc.)
2. GitHub workflows and copilot-instructions.md
3. Docker configuration
4. Apps (api, web, pos)
5. Packages (shared, ui)
6. Environment files and scripts

Let me start scaffolding this properly. I'll use create_file for the initial files and structure them properly.I'll scaffold the Nucleus Business Suite project. Let me create the complete structure: Now let me create the Docker configurations: Now let me create the API app (NestJS): Now let me create the API modules: Now let me create the remaining modules (inventory, sales, customers, storage) and the API Dockerfile: Now let me create the Next.js web app: Now let me create the Tauri POS app: Now let me create the Tauri Rust backend: Now let me create the shared packages: Now let me create the UI package and the scripts: Let me make the scripts executable and update the todo list: Let me verify the project structure is complete: The **Nucleus Business Suite** scaffolding is now **complete**! Here's the final project structure:

## Project Structure Summary

```
Nucleus-Business-Suite/
├── apps/
│   ├── api/                    # NestJS backend
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── common/         # Prisma, Redis, Guards
│   │   │   └── modules/        # auth, users, products, inventory, sales, customers, storage
│   │   └── prisma/             # Schema + seed
│   ├── web/                    # Next.js frontend
│   │   └── src/app/            # App Router pages
│   └── pos/                    # Tauri POS
│       ├── src/                # React frontend
│       └── src-tauri/          # Rust backend (hardware, offline)
├── packages/
│   ├── shared/                 # Types + validation (zod)
│   └── ui/                     # React components (Button, Input, Card, Badge, Spinner)
├── docker/
│   └── docker-compose.deploy.yml  # Production with Traefik
├── scripts/
│   ├── setup.sh                # Initial setup
│   └── reset.sh                # Reset dev environment
└── .github/
    ├── copilot-instructions.md
    └── workflows/              # CI + deploy workflows
```

## Next Steps

```bash
# 1. Navigate to project
cd /home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite

# 2. Run setup script
./scripts/setup.sh

# 3. Start development
pnpm dev

# 4. Access apps
# Web Dashboard: http://localhost:3000
# API Docs:      http://localhost:3001/api/docs

# 5. For POS development (requires Rust + Tauri CLI)
cd apps/pos && pnpm tauri dev
```

## Key Features Implemented

- **Environment-based config** - Same code for Test/Staging/Production
- **Offline-first POS** - SQLite for local storage, sync when online
- **Hardware ready** - Rust commands for printer, cash drawer, scanner
- **Real-time updates** - WebSocket gateway for sales events
- **Shared types** - `@nucleus/shared` used by all apps
- **S3 storage** - Works with Backblaze B2 in all environments

```bash

# 2. Then run:
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/Nucleus-Business-Suite.git

```

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Using \"Multi-Replace String in Files\"",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n// IMPORTANT: Every feature MUST be a separate module\nfeature/\n├── feature.module.ts      // NestJS module (exports services if needed by other modules)\n├── feature.controller.ts  // HTTP endpoints (@Controller decorator)\n├── feature.service.ts     // Business logic (no HTTP logic here)\n├── feature.gateway.ts     // WebSocket events (optional, for real-time features)\n├── dto/                   // Request/Response DTOs with class-validator\n│   ├── create-feature.dto.ts\n│   ├── update-feature.dto.ts\n│   └── query-feature.dto.ts\n├── entities/              // Prisma model extensions or TypeORM entities\n├── interfaces/            // TypeScript interfaces for this module\n├── tests/                 // Unit and integration tests\n│   ├── feature.service.spec.ts\n│   └── feature.controller.spec.ts\n└── README.md              // Module documentation (what it does, how to use it)\nModularity First\n- **Every feature is a module** - No feature should be hardcoded into core files\n- **Self-contained modules** - Each module has its own controllers, services, DTOs, and tests\n- **Clear boundaries** - Modules communicate through well-defined interfaces\n- **Reusable packages** - Common functionality in &#96;packages/shared&#96; and &#96;packages/ui&#96;\n- **Plugin architecture** - New features should be added as modules, not modifications to existing code\n\n### \n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "// IMPORTANT: Every feature MUST be a separate module\nfeature/\n├── feature.module.ts      // NestJS module (exports services if needed by other modules)\n├── feature.controller.ts  // HTTP endpoints (@Controller decorator)\n├── feature.service.ts     // Business logic (no HTTP logic here)\n├── feature.gateway.ts     // WebSocket events (optional, for real-time features)\n├── dto/                   // Request/Response DTOs with class-validator\n│   ├── create-feature.dto.ts\n│   ├── update-feature.dto.ts\n│   └── query-feature.dto.ts\n├── entities/              // Prisma model extensions or TypeORM entities\n├── interfaces/            // TypeScript interfaces for this module\n├── tests/                 // Unit and integration tests\n│   ├── feature.service.spec.ts\n│   └── feature.controller.spec.ts\n└── README.md              // Module documentation (what it does, how to use it)Modularity First\n- **Every feature is a module** - No feature should be hardcoded into core files\n- **Self-contained modules** - Each module has its own controllers, services, DTOs, and tests\n- **Clear boundaries** - Modules communicate through well-defined interfaces\n- **Reusable packages** - Common functionality in &#96;packages/shared&#96; and &#96;packages/ui&#96;\n- **Plugin architecture** - New features should be added as modules, not modifications to existing code\n\n### ",
```
