```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { Badge, Button, Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@nucleus/ui';

const users = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'John Doe',
    email: 'john@example.com',
    role: 'Admin',
    status: 'active',
    joinDate: '2024-01-15',
    avatar: '👤',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Jane Smith',
    email: 'jane@example.com',
    role: 'Manager',
    status: 'active',
    joinDate: '2024-02-20',
    avatar: '👩',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Mike Johnson',
    email: 'mike@example.com',
    role: 'Cashier',
    status: 'active',
    joinDate: '2024-03-10',
    avatar: '👨',
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Sarah Wilson',
    email: 'sarah@example.com',
    role: 'Cashier',
    status: 'inactive',
    joinDate: '2024-01-05',
    avatar: '👩‍🦰',
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'Tom Brown',
    email: 'tom@example.com',
    role: 'Viewer',
    status: 'active',
    joinDate: '2024-04-12',
    avatar: '👨‍💼',
  },
];

const roles = [
  { name: 'Admin', description: 'Full system access', permissions: 'All' },
  { name: 'Manager', description: 'Manage products, orders, inventory', permissions: '12' },
  { name: 'Cashier', description: 'Process sales and returns', permissions: '8' },
  { name: 'Viewer', description: 'View-only access', permissions: '3' },
];

export default function UsersPage() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-ink-900">Users & Roles</h1>
          <p className="text-ink-600">Manage team members and access control</p>
        </div>
        <Link href="/app/users/new">
          <Button className="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white">
            + Add User
          </Button>
        </Link>
      </div>

      {/* Search and filter */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search users..."
          className="rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 placeholder-ink-400 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200"
        />
        <select className="rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-700 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200">
          <option>All Roles</option>
          <option>Admin</option>
          <option>Manager</option>
          <option>Cashier</option>
          <option>Viewer</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* Users table */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80">
        <CardHeader className="border-b border-ink-100 pb-4">
          <CardTitle>Active Users ({users.length})</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="pt-6">
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-ink-100">
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">User</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Email</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Role</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Status</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Joined</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {users.map((user) => (
                  <tr key={user.id} className="border-b border-ink-50 hover:bg-ink-50/40">
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-400 to-primary-600 flex items-center justify-center text-lg">
                          {user.avatar}
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900">{user.name}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-600">{user.email}</td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <Badge variant="info" size="sm">{user.role}</Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <Badge
                        variant={user.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'warning'}
                        size="sm"
                      >
                        {user.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + user.status.slice(1)}
                      </Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-500">{user.joinDate}</td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <Link href={`/app/users/${user.id}/edit`} className="text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 text-sm font-semibold">
                          Edit
                        </Link>
                        <span className="text-ink-300">•</span>
                        <button className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 text-sm font-semibold" type="button">
                          Remove
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Roles grid */}
      <div>
        <h2 className="mb-4 text-xl font-bold text-ink-900">Available Roles</h2>
        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {roles.map((role) => (
            <Card key={role.name} padding="md" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900">{role.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-ink-500">{role.description}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-ink-50 px-2 py-1">
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-ink-700">{role.permissions} permissions</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Permissions info */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-amber-100 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50/80 to-white">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-ink-900">Role-based Access Control (RBAC)</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-ink-600">
            Each role has a predefined set of permissions. Admin can view, create, edit, and delete all resources. Manager can manage products and orders. Cashier can process sales and returns. Viewer has read-only access.
          </p>
        </div>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

**Planning reusable user form and pages**

I'm creating a reusable UserForm component supporting create/edit modes with conditional password fields and avatar upload preview, then updating new and edit user pages to use it, plus adding edit links on the users list page for navigation.**Preparing to re-read for patch**Built a reusable User form with create/edit modes, avatar selection/upload, and password rules:

- Added shared form component `UserForm.tsx` with fields for username, password (create only when allowed), first/last name, email, phone, role select, and avatar (default icons or upload with preview). Includes note that password changes are restricted to Admin with User Module access or Super Admin.
- Wired create page to the form: `page.tsx` (password enabled).
- Added edit page with initial data stub and password disabled: [apps/web/src/app/app/users/[id]/edit/page.tsx](apps/web/src/app/app/users/%5Bid%5D/edit/page.tsx).
- Updated Users list to link “Edit” to the edit page and “Add User” to the new page: `undefined`.

Also wired Products “Add” button earlier to a stub create page; can apply similar form later.

Next steps:
1) Replace console.log submit handlers with real API calls.
2) Implement validation + error states on the form.
3) Hook remove/edit to backend mutations and role-based checks.

];

  { name: 'Admin', description: 'Full system access', permissions: 'All' },
  { name: 'Manager', description: 'Manage products, orders, inventory', permissions: '12' },
  { name: 'Cashier', description: 'Process sales and returns', permissions: '8' },
  { name: 'Viewer', description: 'View-only access', permissions: '3' },
];

export default function UsersPage() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-ink-900">Users & Roles</h1>
          <p className="text-ink-600">Manage team members and access control</p>
        </div>
        <Link href="/app/users/new">
          <Button className="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white">
            + Add User
          </Button>
        </Link>
      </div>

      {/* Search and filter */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search users..."
          className="rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 placeholder-ink-400 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200"
        />
        <select className="rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-700 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200">
          <option>All Roles</option>
          <option>Admin</option>
          <option>Manager</option>
          <option>Cashier</option>
          <option>Viewer</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* Users table */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80">
        <CardHeader className="border-b border-ink-100 pb-4">
          <CardTitle>Active Users ({users.length})</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="pt-6">
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-ink-100">
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">User</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Email</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Role</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Status</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Joined</th>
                  <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {users.map((user) => (
                  <tr key={user.id} className="border-b border-ink-50 hover:bg-ink-50/40">
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-400 to-primary-600 flex items-center justify-center text-lg">
                          {user.avatar}
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900">{user.name}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-600">{user.email}</td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <Badge variant="info" size="sm">{user.role}</Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <Badge
                        variant={user.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'warning'}
                        size="sm"
                      >
                        {user.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + user.status.slice(1)}
                      </Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-500">{user.joinDate}</td>
                    <td className="py-3 px-4">
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <Link href={`/app/users/${user.id}/edit`} className="text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 text-sm font-semibold">
                          Edit
                        </Link>
                        <span className="text-ink-300">•</span>
                        <button className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 text-sm font-semibold" type="button">
                          Remove
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Roles grid */}
      <div>
        <h2 className="mb-4 text-xl font-bold text-ink-900">Available Roles</h2>
        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {roles.map((role) => (
            <Card key={role.name} padding="md" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900">{role.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-ink-500">{role.description}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-ink-50 px-2 py-1">
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-ink-700">{role.permissions} permissions</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Permissions info */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-amber-100 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50/80 to-white">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-ink-900">Role-based Access Control (RBAC)</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-ink-600">
            Each role has a predefined set of permissions. Admin can view, create, edit, and delete all resources. Manager can manage products and orders. Cashier can process sales and returns. Viewer has read-only access.
          </p>
        </div>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```typescript
const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://localhost:4000";

interface RequestOptions {
  method?: string;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  body?: any;
}

export type ApiUser = {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone?: string | null;
  avatar?: string | null;
  userType: string;
  isActive: boolean;
  isSuperAdmin?: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
  lastLoginAt?: string | null;
  role?: ApiRole;
};

export type ApiRole = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string | null;
  roleLevel?: string;
  isActive?: boolean;
};

export type CreateUserPayload = {
  email: string;
  password: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone?: string;
  roleId: string;
  userType?: "BUSINESS" | "CUSTOMER";
  avatar?: string;
};

export type UpdateUserPayload = {
  firstName?: string;
  lastName?: string;
  phone?: string;
  roleId?: string;
  isActive?: boolean;
  avatar?: string;
};

class ApiClient {
  private baseUrl: string;
  private token: string | null = null;

  constructor(baseUrl: string) {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
  }

  setToken(token: string | null) {
    this.token = token;
  }

  private async request<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestOptions = {}): Promise<T> {
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      ...options.headers,
    };

    if (this.token) {
      headers["Authorization"] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}`, {
      method: options.method || "GET",
      headers,
      body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ message: "Request failed" }));
      throw new Error(error.message || `HTTP ${response.status}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  }

  // Auth
  login(email: string, password: string) {
    return this.request<{ accessToken: string; refreshToken: string; user: any }>("/auth/login", {
      method: "POST",
      body: { email, password },
    });
  }

  // Products
  getProducts(params?: { search?: string; categoryId?: string }) {
    const query = new URLSearchParams(params as any).toString();
    return this.request<any[]>(`/products${query ? `?${query}` : ""}`);
  }

  getProduct(id: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/products/${id}`);
  }

  getProductByBarcode(barcode: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/products/barcode/${barcode}`);
  }

  // Sales
  getSales() {
    return this.request<any[]>("/sales");
  }

  getSalesToday() {
    return this.request<any>("/sales/today");
  }

  createSale(data: any) {
    return this.request<any>("/sales", { method: "POST", body: data });
  }

  // Inventory
  getInventorySummary() {
    return this.request<any>("/inventory/summary");
  }

  getLowStockProducts() {
    return this.request<any[]>("/inventory/low-stock");
  }

  // Customers
  getCustomers(search?: string) {
    const query = search ? `?search=${encodeURIComponent(search)}` : "";
    return this.request<any[]>(`/customers${query}`);
  }

  getCustomer(id: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/customers/${id}`);
  }
}

export const api = new ApiClient(API_URL);

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```typescript
const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://localhost:4000";

interface RequestOptions {
  method?: string;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  body?: any;
}

export type ApiUser = {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone?: string | null;
  avatar?: string | null;
  userType: string;
  isActive: boolean;
  isSuperAdmin?: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
  lastLoginAt?: string | null;
  role?: ApiRole;
};

export type ApiRole = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string | null;
  roleLevel?: string;
  isActive?: boolean;
};

export type CreateUserPayload = {
  email: string;
  password: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone?: string;
  roleId: string;
  userType?: "BUSINESS" | "CUSTOMER";
  avatar?: string;
};

export type UpdateUserPayload = {
  firstName?: string;
  lastName?: string;
  phone?: string;
  roleId?: string;
  isActive?: boolean;
  avatar?: string;
};

class ApiClient {
  private baseUrl: string;
  private token: string | null = null;

  constructor(baseUrl: string) {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
  }

  setToken(token: string | null) {
    this.token = token;
  }

  private async request<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestOptions = {}): Promise<T> {
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      ...options.headers,
    };

    if (this.token) {
      headers["Authorization"] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}`, {
      method: options.method || "GET",
      headers,
      body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ message: "Request failed" }));
      throw new Error(error.message || `HTTP ${response.status}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  }

  // Auth
  login(email: string, password: string) {
    return this.request<{ accessToken: string; refreshToken: string; user: any }>("/auth/login", {
      method: "POST",
      body: { email, password },
    });
  }

  // Users
  getUsers(params?: { userType?: string; isActive?: boolean }) {
    const query = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params?.userType) query.set("userType", params.userType);
    if (params?.isActive !== undefined) query.set("isActive", String(params.isActive));
    const suffix = query.toString();
    return this.request<ApiUser[]>(`/users${suffix ? `?${suffix}` : ""}`);
  }

  getUser(id: string) {
    return this.request<ApiUser>(`/users/${id}`);
  }

  createUser(payload: CreateUserPayload) {
    return this.request<ApiUser>("/users", { method: "POST", body: payload });
  }

  updateUser(id: string, payload: UpdateUserPayload) {
    return this.request<ApiUser>(`/users/${id}`, { method: "PATCH", body: payload });
  }

  deleteUser(id: string) {
    return this.request<{ message: string }>(`/users/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
  }

  // Roles
  getRoles() {
    return this.request<ApiRole[]>("/roles");
  }

  // Products
  getProducts(params?: { search?: string; categoryId?: string }) {
    const query = new URLSearchParams(params as any).toString();
    return this.request<any[]>(`/products${query ? `?${query}` : ""}`);
  }

  getProduct(id: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/products/${id}`);
  }

  getProductByBarcode(barcode: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/products/barcode/${barcode}`);
  }

  // Sales
  getSales() {
    return this.request<any[]>("/sales");
  }

  getSalesToday() {
    return this.request<any>("/sales/today");
  }

  createSale(data: any) {
    return this.request<any>("/sales", { method: "POST", body: data });
  }

  // Inventory
  getInventorySummary() {
    return this.request<any>("/inventory/summary");
  }

  getLowStockProducts() {
    return this.request<any[]>("/inventory/low-stock");
  }

  // Customers
  getCustomers(search?: string) {
    const query = search ? `?search=${encodeURIComponent(search)}` : "";
    return this.request<any[]>(`/customers${query}`);
  }

  getCustomer(id: string) {
    return this.request<any>(`/customers/${id}`);
  }
}

export const api = new ApiClient(API_URL);

```


</details>
</tool-use>

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Input, Button, Card, Badge } from '@nucleus/ui';
import Image from 'next/image';

export type UserFormMode = 'create' | 'edit';

export type RoleOption = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string | null;
};

interface UserFormProps {
  mode: UserFormMode;
  roles: RoleOption[];
  canEditPassword?: boolean;
  submitting?: boolean;
  error?: string;
  initialData?: Partial<UserFormState>;
  onSubmit?: (data: UserFormState) => void;
}

export interface UserFormState {
  email: string;
  password: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone: string;
  roleId: string;
  userType: 'BUSINESS' | 'CUSTOMER';
  isActive: boolean;
  avatarType: 'default' | 'upload';
  avatarIcon: string;
  avatarFile?: File | null;
  avatarPreview?: string;
  avatar?: string;
}

const defaultIcons = ['👤', '🧑', '👩', '👨', '🧑‍💻', '🧑‍💼'];

export function UserForm({
  mode,
  roles,
  canEditPassword = false,
  submitting,
  error,
  initialData,
  onSubmit,
}: UserFormProps) {
  const [state, setState] = useState<UserFormState>(() => ({
    email: initialData?.email || '',
    password: '',
    firstName: initialData?.firstName || '',
    lastName: initialData?.lastName || '',
    phone: initialData?.phone || '',
    roleId: initialData?.roleId || roles[0]?.id || '',
    userType: initialData?.userType || 'BUSINESS',
    isActive: initialData?.isActive ?? true,
    avatarType: initialData?.avatarType || 'default',
    avatarIcon: initialData?.avatarIcon || defaultIcons[0],
    avatarFile: null,
    avatarPreview: initialData?.avatarPreview || initialData?.avatar,
    avatar: initialData?.avatar,
  }));

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!roles.length) return;
    setState((s) => ({ ...s, roleId: s.roleId || roles[0].id }));
  }, [roles]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!initialData) return;
    setState((s) => ({
      ...s,
      email: initialData.email ?? s.email,
      firstName: initialData.firstName ?? s.firstName,
      lastName: initialData.lastName ?? s.lastName,
      phone: initialData.phone ?? s.phone,
      roleId: initialData.roleId ?? s.roleId,
      userType: initialData.userType ?? s.userType,
      isActive: initialData.isActive ?? s.isActive,
      avatarIcon: initialData.avatarIcon ?? s.avatarIcon,
      avatarPreview: initialData.avatarPreview ?? initialData.avatar ?? s.avatarPreview,
      avatarType: initialData.avatarType ?? s.avatarType,
      avatar: initialData.avatar ?? s.avatar,
    }));
  }, [initialData]);

  const avatarPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (state.avatarType === 'upload' && state.avatarPreview) return state.avatarPreview;
    return state.avatarIcon;
  }, [state.avatarIcon, state.avatarPreview, state.avatarType]);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (state.avatarPreview?.startsWith('blob:')) URL.revokeObjectURL(state.avatarPreview);
    };
  }, [state.avatarPreview]);

  const handleFileChange = (file?: File) => {
    if (!file) return;
    const preview = URL.createObjectURL(file);
    setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'upload', avatarFile: file, avatarPreview: preview }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const avatarValue =
      state.avatarType === 'upload'
        ? state.avatarPreview && !state.avatarPreview.startsWith('blob:')
          ? state.avatarPreview
          : state.avatarIcon
        : state.avatarIcon;
    onSubmit?.({ ...state, avatar: avatarValue });
  };

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/90 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/80">
        <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
          <div className="space-y-4 lg:col-span-2">
            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <Input
                label="Email"
                name="email"
                type="email"
                value={state.email}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, email: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="jane@example.com"
                required
              />
              {mode === 'create' && canEditPassword && (
                <Input
                  label="Password"
                  name="password"
                  type="password"
                  value={state.password}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, password: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="••••••••"
                  minLength={8}
                  required
                />
              )}
              {mode === 'edit' && (
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-ink-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-ink-600 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-800/70 dark:text-ink-200">
                  Password changes are limited to Admins with User Module access or Super Admins.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <Input
                label="First name"
                name="firstName"
                value={state.firstName}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, firstName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="Jane"
                required
              />
              <Input
                label="Last name"
                name="lastName"
                value={state.lastName}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, lastName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="Doe"
                required
              />
              <Input
                label="Phone"
                name="phone"
                value={state.phone}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, phone: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="+1 (555) 000-0000"
              />
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium text-ink-800 dark:text-ink-100">User type</label>
                <select
                  className="w-full rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100"
                  value={state.userType}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, userType: e.target.value as UserFormState['userType'] }))}
                >
                  <option value="BUSINESS">Business</option>
                  <option value="CUSTOMER">Customer</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium text-ink-800 dark:text-ink-100">Role</label>
                <select
                  className="w-full rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100"
                  value={state.roleId}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, roleId: e.target.value }))}
                  required
                  disabled={!roles.length}
                >
                  {roles.length === 0 && <option value="">No roles available</option>}
                  {roles.map((role) => (
                    <option key={role.id} value={role.id}>
                      {role.name}
                    </option>
                  ))}
                </select>
                {roles.length === 0 && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-300">Add a role in Settings to continue.</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <label className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-ink-800 shadow-sm dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100">
                <input
                  type="checkbox"
                  className="h-4 w-4 accent-primary-600"
                  checked={state.isActive}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, isActive: e.target.checked }))}
                />
                Active account
              </label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100">Avatar</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-300">Upload a photo or pick a default icon.</p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-ink-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900">
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary-50 text-2xl dark:bg-primary-900/40">
                {avatarPreview.startsWith('blob:') ? (
                  <div className="relative h-12 w-12 overflow-hidden rounded-full">
                    <Image src={avatarPreview} alt="Avatar" fill sizes="48px" className="object-cover" />
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <span>{avatarPreview}</span>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">
                <label className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
                  <input
                    type="radio"
                    name="avatarType"
                    value="default"
                    checked={state.avatarType === 'default'}
                    onChange={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'default', avatarFile: null, avatarPreview: undefined }))}
                  />
                  Use default icon
                </label>
                <label className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
                  <input
                    type="radio"
                    name="avatarType"
                    value="upload"
                    checked={state.avatarType === 'upload'}
                    onChange={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'upload' }))}
                  />
                  Upload photo
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>

            {state.avatarType === 'default' && (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-2">
                {defaultIcons.map((icon) => (
                  <button
                    key={icon}
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full border ${
                      state.avatarIcon === icon
                        ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 text-primary-700'
                        : 'border-ink-100 bg-white text-ink-800 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarIcon: icon, avatarPreview: undefined }))}
                  >
                    <span className="text-xl">{icon}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            {state.avatarType === 'upload' && (
              <label className="flex h-24 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-ink-200 bg-ink-50 text-sm text-ink-600 hover:border-primary-300 hover:bg-primary-50 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900/60 dark:text-ink-200">
                <input
                  type="file"
                  accept="image/*"
                  className="hidden"
                  onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e.target.files?.[0])}
                />
                Click to upload photo
              </label>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Card>

      {error && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700 dark:border-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/50 dark:text-red-100">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
        <Button variant="ghost" type="button" onClick={() => history.back()}>
          Cancel
        </Button>
        <Button type="submit" variant="primary" loading={submitting} disabled={submitting || !roles.length}>
          {mode === 'create' ? 'Create user' : 'Save changes'}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </form>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { Input, Button, Card } from '@nucleus/ui';
import Image from 'next/image';

export type UserFormMode = 'create' | 'edit';

export type RoleOption = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string | null;
};

interface UserFormProps {
  mode: UserFormMode;
  roles: RoleOption[];
  canEditPassword?: boolean;
  submitting?: boolean;
  error?: string;
  initialData?: Partial<UserFormState>;
  onSubmit?: (data: UserFormState) => void;
}

export interface UserFormState {
  email: string;
  password: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  phone: string;
  roleId: string;
  userType: 'BUSINESS' | 'CUSTOMER';
  isActive: boolean;
  avatarType: 'default' | 'upload';
  avatarIcon: string;
  avatarFile?: File | null;
  avatarPreview?: string;
  avatar?: string;
}

const defaultIcons = ['👤', '🧑', '👩', '👨', '🧑‍💻', '🧑‍💼'];

export function UserForm({
  mode,
  roles,
  canEditPassword = false,
  submitting,
  error,
  initialData,
  onSubmit,
}: UserFormProps) {
  const [state, setState] = useState<UserFormState>(() => ({
    email: initialData?.email || '',
    password: '',
    firstName: initialData?.firstName || '',
    lastName: initialData?.lastName || '',
    phone: initialData?.phone || '',
    roleId: initialData?.roleId || roles[0]?.id || '',
    userType: initialData?.userType || 'BUSINESS',
    isActive: initialData?.isActive ?? true,
    avatarType: initialData?.avatarType || 'default',
    avatarIcon: initialData?.avatarIcon || defaultIcons[0],
    avatarFile: null,
    avatarPreview: initialData?.avatarPreview || initialData?.avatar,
    avatar: initialData?.avatar,
  }));

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!roles.length) return;
    setState((s) => ({ ...s, roleId: s.roleId || roles[0].id }));
  }, [roles]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!initialData) return;
    setState((s) => ({
      ...s,
      email: initialData.email ?? s.email,
      firstName: initialData.firstName ?? s.firstName,
      lastName: initialData.lastName ?? s.lastName,
      phone: initialData.phone ?? s.phone,
      roleId: initialData.roleId ?? s.roleId,
      userType: initialData.userType ?? s.userType,
      isActive: initialData.isActive ?? s.isActive,
      avatarIcon: initialData.avatarIcon ?? s.avatarIcon,
      avatarPreview: initialData.avatarPreview ?? initialData.avatar ?? s.avatarPreview,
      avatarType: initialData.avatarType ?? s.avatarType,
      avatar: initialData.avatar ?? s.avatar,
    }));
  }, [initialData]);

  const avatarPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (state.avatarType === 'upload' && state.avatarPreview) return state.avatarPreview;
    return state.avatarIcon;
  }, [state.avatarIcon, state.avatarPreview, state.avatarType]);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (state.avatarPreview?.startsWith('blob:')) URL.revokeObjectURL(state.avatarPreview);
    };
  }, [state.avatarPreview]);

  const handleFileChange = (file?: File) => {
    if (!file) return;
    const preview = URL.createObjectURL(file);
    setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'upload', avatarFile: file, avatarPreview: preview }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const avatarValue =
      state.avatarType === 'upload'
        ? state.avatarPreview && !state.avatarPreview.startsWith('blob:')
          ? state.avatarPreview
          : state.avatarIcon
        : state.avatarIcon;
    onSubmit?.({ ...state, avatar: avatarValue });
  };

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/90 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/80">
        <div className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3">
          <div className="space-y-4 lg:col-span-2">
            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <Input
                label="Email"
                name="email"
                type="email"
                value={state.email}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, email: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="jane@example.com"
                required
              />
              {mode === 'create' && canEditPassword && (
                <Input
                  label="Password"
                  name="password"
                  type="password"
                  value={state.password}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, password: e.target.value }))}
                  placeholder="••••••••"
                  minLength={8}
                  required
                />
              )}
              {mode === 'edit' && (
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-ink-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-ink-600 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-800/70 dark:text-ink-200">
                  Password changes are limited to Admins with User Module access or Super Admins.
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <Input
                label="First name"
                name="firstName"
                value={state.firstName}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, firstName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="Jane"
                required
              />
              <Input
                label="Last name"
                name="lastName"
                value={state.lastName}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, lastName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="Doe"
                required
              />
              <Input
                label="Phone"
                name="phone"
                value={state.phone}
                onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, phone: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="+1 (555) 000-0000"
              />
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium text-ink-800 dark:text-ink-100">User type</label>
                <select
                  className="w-full rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100"
                  value={state.userType}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, userType: e.target.value as UserFormState['userType'] }))}
                >
                  <option value="BUSINESS">Business</option>
                  <option value="CUSTOMER">Customer</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium text-ink-800 dark:text-ink-100">Role</label>
                <select
                  className="w-full rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-ink-900 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100"
                  value={state.roleId}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, roleId: e.target.value }))}
                  required
                  disabled={!roles.length}
                >
                  {roles.length === 0 && <option value="">No roles available</option>}
                  {roles.map((role) => (
                    <option key={role.id} value={role.id}>
                      {role.name}
                    </option>
                  ))}
                </select>
                {roles.length === 0 && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-300">Add a role in Settings to continue.</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <label className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-ink-800 shadow-sm dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100">
                <input
                  type="checkbox"
                  className="h-4 w-4 accent-primary-600"
                  checked={state.isActive}
                  onChange={(e) => setState((s) => ({ ...s, isActive: e.target.checked }))}
                />
                Active account
              </label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100">Avatar</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-300">Upload a photo or pick a default icon.</p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-ink-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900">
              <div className="flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary-50 text-2xl dark:bg-primary-900/40">
                {avatarPreview.startsWith('blob:') ? (
                  <div className="relative h-12 w-12 overflow-hidden rounded-full">
                    <Image src={avatarPreview} alt="Avatar" fill sizes="48px" className="object-cover" />
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <span>{avatarPreview}</span>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">
                <label className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
                  <input
                    type="radio"
                    name="avatarType"
                    value="default"
                    checked={state.avatarType === 'default'}
                    onChange={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'default', avatarFile: null, avatarPreview: undefined }))}
                  />
                  Use default icon
                </label>
                <label className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300">
                  <input
                    type="radio"
                    name="avatarType"
                    value="upload"
                    checked={state.avatarType === 'upload'}
                    onChange={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarType: 'upload' }))}
                  />
                  Upload photo
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>

            {state.avatarType === 'default' && (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-2">
                {defaultIcons.map((icon) => (
                  <button
                    key={icon}
                    type="button"
                    className={`flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full border ${
                      state.avatarIcon === icon
                        ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 text-primary-700'
                        : 'border-ink-100 bg-white text-ink-800 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => setState((s) => ({ ...s, avatarIcon: icon, avatarPreview: undefined }))}
                  >
                    <span className="text-xl">{icon}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            {state.avatarType === 'upload' && (
              <label className="flex h-24 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-ink-200 bg-ink-50 text-sm text-ink-600 hover:border-primary-300 hover:bg-primary-50 dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900/60 dark:text-ink-200">
                <input
                  type="file"
                  accept="image/*"
                  className="hidden"
                  onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e.target.files?.[0])}
                />
                Click to upload photo
              </label>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Card>

      {error && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700 dark:border-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/50 dark:text-red-100">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
        <Button variant="ghost" type="button" onClick={() => history.back()}>
          Cancel
        </Button>
        <Button type="submit" variant="primary" loading={submitting} disabled={submitting || !roles.length}>
          {mode === 'create' ? 'Create user' : 'Save changes'}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </form>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { api, type CreateUserPayload } from '@/lib/api';
import { UserForm, type UserFormState } from '../UserForm';

export default function NewUserPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const queryClient = useQueryClient();

  const rolesQuery = useQuery({ queryKey: ['roles'], queryFn: () => api.getRoles() });

  const createUser = useMutation({
    mutationFn: async (form: UserFormState) => {
      const payload: CreateUserPayload = {
        email: form.email,
        password: form.password,
        firstName: form.firstName,
        lastName: form.lastName,
        phone: form.phone || undefined,
        roleId: form.roleId,
        userType: form.userType,
        avatar: form.avatar,
      };
      return api.createUser(payload);
    },
    onSuccess: () => {
      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['users'] });
      router.push('/app/users');
    },
  });

  const roles = rolesQuery.data || [];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Add User</h1>
          <p className="text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">Create a new team member and assign a role.</p>
        </div>
        <Link
          href="/app/users"
          className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-700 hover:text-primary-800"
        >
          ← Back to users
        </Link>
      </div>

      <UserForm
        mode="create"
        roles={roles}
        canEditPassword
        submitting={createUser.isPending}
        error={createUser.error instanceof Error ? createUser.error.message : undefined}
        onSubmit={(data) => createUser.mutate(data)}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { api, type UpdateUserPayload } from '@/lib/api';
import { UserForm, type UserFormState } from '../../UserForm';

export default function EditUserPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
  const { id } = params;
  const router = useRouter();
  const queryClient = useQueryClient();

  const rolesQuery = useQuery({ queryKey: ['roles'], queryFn: () => api.getRoles() });
  const userQuery = useQuery({ queryKey: ['user', id], queryFn: () => api.getUser(id) });

  const updateUser = useMutation({
    mutationFn: async (form: UserFormState) => {
      const payload: UpdateUserPayload = {
        firstName: form.firstName,
        lastName: form.lastName,
        phone: form.phone || undefined,
        roleId: form.roleId,
        isActive: form.isActive,
        avatar: form.avatar,
      };
      return api.updateUser(id, payload);
    },
    onSuccess: () => {
      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['users'] });
      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['user', id] });
      router.push('/app/users');
    },
  });

  const roles = rolesQuery.data || [];
  const user = userQuery.data;

  const initialData = user
    ? {
        email: user.email,
        firstName: user.firstName,
        lastName: user.lastName,
        phone: user.phone ?? '',
        roleId: user.role?.id || roles[0]?.id || '',
        userType: (user.userType as UserFormState['userType']) || 'BUSINESS',
        isActive: user.isActive,
        avatar: user.avatar || undefined,
        avatarIcon: user.avatar || undefined,
      }
    : undefined;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Edit User</h1>
          <p className="text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">Update basic information. Password changes require admin privileges.</p>
        </div>
        <Link
          href="/app/users"
          className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary-700 hover:text-primary-800"
        >
          ← Back to users
        </Link>
      </div>

      {userQuery.isLoading && <p className="text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">Loading user...</p>}
      {userQuery.error && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-700 dark:border-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/50 dark:text-red-100">
          {(userQuery.error as Error).message}
        </div>
      )}

      {user && (
        <UserForm
          mode="edit"
          roles={roles}
          canEditPassword={false}
          initialData={initialData}
          submitting={updateUser.isPending}
          error={updateUser.error instanceof Error ? updateUser.error.message : undefined}
          onSubmit={(data) => updateUser.mutate(data)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Badge, Button, Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@nucleus/ui';
import { api, type ApiUser } from '@/lib/api';

function formatName(user: ApiUser) {
  const name = `${user.firstName || ''} ${user.lastName || ''}`.trim();
  return name || user.email;
}

export default function UsersPage() {
  const queryClient = useQueryClient();

  const usersQuery = useQuery({ queryKey: ['users'], queryFn: () => api.getUsers() });
  const rolesQuery = useQuery({ queryKey: ['roles'], queryFn: () => api.getRoles() });

  const deleteUser = useMutation({
    mutationFn: (id: string) => api.deleteUser(id),
    onSuccess: () => {
      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['users'] });
    },
  });

  const handleDelete = (id: string) => {
    const user = usersQuery.data?.find((u) => u.id === id);
    const name = user ? formatName(user) : 'this user';
    if (!confirm(`Remove ${name}? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
    deleteUser.mutate(id);
  };

  const users = usersQuery.data || [];
  const roles = rolesQuery.data || [];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Users & Roles</h1>
          <p className="text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">Manage team members and access control</p>
        </div>
        <Link href="/app/users/new">
          <Button className="bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 text-white">
            + Add User
          </Button>
        </Link>
      </div>

      {/* Users table */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/80">
        <CardHeader className="border-b border-ink-100 pb-4 dark:border-ink-800">
          <CardTitle className="text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Users ({users.length})</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="pt-6">
          {usersQuery.isLoading && (
            <p className="text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">Loading users…</p>
          )}
          {usersQuery.error && (
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-300">{(usersQuery.error as Error).message}</p>
          )}
          {usersQuery.isSuccess && users.length === 0 && (
            <p className="text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">No users found.</p>
          )}

          {users.length > 0 && (
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-b border-ink-100 dark:border-ink-800">
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">User</th>
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">Email</th>
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">Role</th>
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">Status</th>
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">Joined</th>
                    <th className="text-left font-semibold text-ink-900 py-3 px-4 dark:text-ink-100">Actions</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {users.map((user) => (
                    <tr key={user.id} className="border-b border-ink-50 hover:bg-ink-50/40 dark:border-ink-800 dark:hover:bg-ink-800/60">
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-400 to-primary-600 flex items-center justify-center text-lg text-white">
                            {user.avatar || user.firstName?.[0] || user.email[0]}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">{formatName(user)}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-200">{user.userType}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">{user.email}</td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <Badge variant="info" size="sm">{user.role?.name || '—'}</Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <Badge
                          variant={user.isActive ? 'success' : 'warning'}
                          size="sm"
                        >
                          {user.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4 text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-300">{new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                          <Link href={`/app/users/${user.id}/edit`} className="text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 text-sm font-semibold">
                            Edit
                          </Link>
                          <span className="text-ink-300">•</span>
                          <button
                            className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 text-sm font-semibold disabled:opacity-60"
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => handleDelete(user.id)}
                            disabled={deleteUser.isPending}
                          >
                            Remove
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Roles grid */}
      <div>
        <h2 className="mb-4 text-xl font-bold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Available Roles</h2>
        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {roles.map((role) => (
            <Card key={role.id} padding="md" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/80">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">{role.name}</p>
                  {role.description && <p className="text-xs text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-200">{role.description}</p>}
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-ink-100 bg-ink-50 px-2 py-1 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-800">
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-ink-700 dark:text-ink-50">Role level: {role.roleLevel || 'custom'}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </Card>
          ))}
          {roles.length === 0 && (
            <Card padding="md" className="border-ink-100 bg-white/80 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/80">
              <p className="text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">No roles returned. Create roles in Settings.</p>
            </Card>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Permissions info */}
      <Card padding="lg" className="border-amber-100 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50/80 to-white dark:border-amber-500/40 dark:from-ink-900 dark:to-ink-900">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Role-based Access Control (RBAC)</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200">
            Each role has a predefined set of permissions. Admin can view, create, edit, and delete all resources. Manager can manage products and orders. Cashier can process sales and returns. Viewer has read-only access.
          </p>
        </div>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
"use client";

import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { useEffect, useMemo } from "react";
import { api } from "@/lib/api";
import { ThemeProvider } from "./theme-provider";

export function Providers({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const queryClient = useMemo(
    () =>
      new QueryClient({
        defaultOptions: {
          queries: {
            staleTime: 60 * 1000, // 1 minute
            refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
          },
        },
      }),
    []
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    const storedToken = typeof window !== "undefined" ? localStorage.getItem("accessToken") : null;
    const envToken = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_TOKEN;
    api.setToken(storedToken || envToken || null);
  }, []);

  return (
    <ThemeProvider>
      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>{children}</QueryClientProvider>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/src/app/theme-provider.tsx)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/web/src/app/theme-provider.tsx)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n\ntype Theme = \"light\" | \"dark\";\n\ninterface ThemeContextValue {\n  theme: Theme;\n  toggle: () =&gt; void;\n}\n\nconst ThemeContext = createContext&lt;ThemeContextValue | null&gt;(null);\n\nexport function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  const [theme, setTheme] = useState&lt;Theme&gt;(() =&gt; \"dark\");\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const stored = typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? localStorage.getItem(\"nucleus-theme\") : null;\n    if (stored === \"light\" || stored === \"dark\") {\n      setTheme(stored);\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (typeof document === \"undefined\") return;\n    const root = document.documentElement;\n    root.classList.toggle(\"dark\", theme === \"dark\");\n    document.body.dataset.theme = theme;\n    localStorage.setItem(\"nucleus-theme\", theme);\n  }, [theme]);\n\n  const toggle = () =&gt; setTheme((t) =&gt; (t === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\"));\n\n  const value = useMemo(() =&gt; ({ theme, toggle }), [theme]);\n\n  return &lt;ThemeContext.Provider value={value}&gt;{children}&lt;/ThemeContext.Provider&gt;;\n}\n\nexport function useTheme() {\n  const ctx = useContext(ThemeContext);\n  if (!ctx) throw new Error(\"useTheme must be used within ThemeProvider\");\n  return ctx;\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

import type { Metadata } from "next";
import { Inter } from "next/font/google";
import "./globals.css";
import { Providers } from "./providers";

const inter = Inter({ subsets: ["latin"] });

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Nucleus Business Suite",
  description: "Web-based ERP with multi-platform POS system",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <html lang="en" className="dark" suppressHydrationWarning>
      <body className={`${inter.className} antialiased`}>
        <Providers>{children}</Providers>
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Badge, Button } from '@nucleus/ui';
import { useTheme } from '@/app/theme-provider';

export default function DashboardLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
  const { theme, toggle } = useTheme();

  const menuItems = [
    { label: 'Dashboard', href: '/app', icon: '📊' },
    { label: 'Products', href: '/app/products', icon: '📦' },
    { label: 'Sales', href: '/app/sales', icon: '💳' },
    { label: 'Customers', href: '/app/customers', icon: '👥' },
    { label: 'Inventory', href: '/app/inventory', icon: '📋' },
    { label: 'Users', href: '/app/users', icon: '👤' },
    { label: 'Settings', href: '/app/settings', icon: '⚙️' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen bg-ink-50 text-ink-900 dark:bg-ink-950 dark:text-ink-50">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside
        className={`fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 w-64 transform border-r border-ink-200 bg-white transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out lg:relative lg:translate-x-0 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900 ${
          sidebarOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full'
        }`}
      >
        <div className="flex h-16 items-center justify-between border-b border-ink-200 px-4 dark:border-ink-800">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="h-8 w-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-600 to-primary-700" />
            <span className="text-lg font-bold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50">Nucleus</span>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
            className="text-ink-400 hover:text-ink-600 lg:hidden"
          >
            ✕
          </button>
        </div>

        <nav className="space-y-1 px-2 py-4">
          {menuItems.map((item) => (
            <Link
              key={item.href}
              href={item.href}
              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-ink-700 transition hover:bg-primary-50 hover:text-primary-700 dark:text-ink-100 dark:hover:bg-ink-800/80 dark:hover:text-primary-200"
              onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
            >
              <span className="text-base">{item.icon}</span>
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>

        <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-4 right-4 space-y-2 border-t border-ink-200 pt-4 dark:border-ink-800">
          <div className="text-xs font-medium text-ink-500 dark:text-ink-200">API Status</div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-emerald-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm dark:bg-emerald-900/40">
            <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500" />
            <span className="text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-200">Connected</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main content */}
      <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col">
        {/* Top bar */}
        <header className="sticky top-0 z-40 border-b border-ink-200 bg-white shadow-sm dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900">
          <div className="flex h-16 items-center justify-between px-4 lg:px-6">
            <button
              onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(true)}
              className="text-ink-600 hover:text-ink-900 lg:hidden"
            >
              <svg className="h-6 w-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16" />
              </svg>
            </button>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 md:gap-4">
              <input
                type="text"
                placeholder="Search..."
                className="hidden rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm text-ink-900 placeholder-ink-400 focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 md:block dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100 dark:placeholder-ink-400"
              />
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={toggle}
                className="border-ink-200 text-ink-700 hover:border-primary-200 hover:bg-primary-50 hover:text-primary-700 dark:border-ink-700 dark:text-ink-100 dark:hover:border-primary-500 dark:hover:bg-ink-800"
              >
                {theme === 'dark' ? '☀️ Light' : '🌙 Dark'}
              </Button>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Badge variant="info" size="sm">
                  Demo
                </Badge>
                <div className="h-8 w-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-400 to-primary-600" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Page content */}
        <main className="flex-1 overflow-auto px-4 py-6 lg:px-6">
          {children}
        </main>
      </div>

      {/* Mobile overlay */}
      {sidebarOpen && (
        <div
          className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black/20 lg:hidden"
          onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

:root {
  color-scheme: light;
  --bg-surface: #f6f7fb;
  --bg-panel: #ffffff;
  --border-soft: #e2e8f0;
  --text-main: #0f172a;
  --text-muted: #475569;
  --shadow-soft: 0 12px 45px -18px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18);
}

:root.dark {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --bg-surface: #0b1220;
  --bg-panel: #0f172a;
  --border-soft: #1f2937;
  --text-main: #e2e8f0;
  --text-muted: #94a3b8;
  --shadow-soft: 0 12px 45px -18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
}

body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 25% 20%, rgba(71, 108, 240, 0.08), transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 75% 0%, rgba(17, 94, 163, 0.06), transparent 30%),
    var(--bg-surface);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

.dark body {
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, rgba(71, 108, 240, 0.12), transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 10%, rgba(17, 94, 163, 0.12), transparent 30%),
    var(--bg-surface);
}

a {
  color: #3153d4;
}

.dark a {
  color: #9bb4ff;
}

@layer base {
  h1 { @apply text-4xl font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50; }
  h2 { @apply text-3xl font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50; }
  h3 { @apply text-2xl font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50; }
  p { @apply text-ink-600 dark:text-ink-200; }
}

@layer utilities {
  .card-surface {
    @apply bg-white shadow-card border border-slate-200/80 rounded-xl;
  }
  .muted {
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }
}

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { cn } from '../utils';

export interface InputProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  label?: string;
  error?: string;
  leftIcon?: React.ReactNode;
  rightIcon?: React.ReactNode;
}

export const Input = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, InputProps>(
  ({ className, label, error, leftIcon, rightIcon, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <div className="w-full">
        {label && (
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1 dark:text-ink-200">
            {label}
          </label>
        )}
        <div className="relative">
          {leftIcon && (
            <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-ink-400">
              {leftIcon}
            </div>
          )}
          <input
            ref={ref}
            className={cn(
              'block w-full rounded-lg border border-ink-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-ink-900 placeholder-ink-400 shadow-sm',
              'focus:border-primary-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-200 focus:outline-none',
              'disabled:bg-ink-50 disabled:text-ink-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed',
              'dark:border-ink-700 dark:bg-ink-900 dark:text-ink-100 dark:placeholder-ink-400 dark:focus:border-primary-400 dark:focus:ring-primary-500/30',
              error && 'border-red-500 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-200 dark:border-red-500 dark:focus:ring-red-500/30',
              leftIcon && 'pl-10',
              rightIcon && 'pr-10',
              className
            )}
            {...props}
          />
          {rightIcon && (
            <div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 pr-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-ink-400">
              {rightIcon}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        {error && (
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }
);

Input.displayName = 'Input';

```


</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="copilot_applyPatch">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **copilot_applyPatch** • Using "Apply Patch"</summary>

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { cn } from '../utils';

export interface CardProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  padding?: 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
}

export const Card = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardProps>(
  ({ className, padding = 'md', children, ...props }, ref) => {
    const paddings = {
      none: '',
      sm: 'p-3',
      md: 'p-4',
      lg: 'p-6',
    };

    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={cn(
          'bg-white rounded-2xl border border-ink-100 shadow-sm dark:bg-ink-900 dark:border-ink-800',
          paddings[padding],
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      >
        {children}
      </div>
    );
  }
);

Card.displayName = 'Card';

export interface CardHeaderProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {}

export const CardHeader = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardHeaderProps>(
  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    <div ref={ref} className={cn('px-4 py-3 border-b border-ink-100 bg-white/60 dark:border-ink-800 dark:bg-ink-900/70', className)} {...props} />
  )
);

CardHeader.displayName = 'CardHeader';

export interface CardTitleProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement> {}

export const CardTitle = React.forwardRef<HTMLHeadingElement, CardTitleProps>(
  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    <h3 ref={ref} className={cn('text-lg font-semibold text-ink-900 dark:text-ink-50', className)} {...props} />
  )
);

CardTitle.displayName = 'CardTitle';

export interface CardContentProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {}

export const CardContent = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CardContentProps>(
  ({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    <div ref={ref} className={cn('p-4', className)} {...props} />
  )
);

CardContent.displayName = 'CardContent';

```


</details>
</tool-use>
